| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_** Note from Chairman Stepanek **__** **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_ _****_Upcoming Events _****_ House Republican Update _****_ Senate Republican Update _**
**_ Republican Spotlight_**
** _ Noteworthy News_**
** __****__****_ NHGOP Tweets _
**** NH Federation of Republican Women**
********** NH Young Republicans************ NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****
**
** This has been an incredible week for the New Hampshire Republican Party, and it brings a new sense of excitement as we look forward to the New Year!

New Hampshire College Republicans had their annual state address on Saturday, where participating schools UNH, SNHU, Saint Anselms, and Dartmouth joined together to network, acknowledge on-campus achievements, and brainstorm future endeavors. This group is so important to the future of the Republican Party because they represent the next generation of leaders. Our young republican groups deserve our continued support and inclusion - I hope you’ll join me in making them a bigger part of our state party happenings!

We had an incredibly successful Special Election Day in Derry, with Representative-Elect Jodi Nelson overwhelmingly taking the majority vote. Jodi’s hard work, volunteer recruitment, and impeccable campaign strategy allowed her to reach countless voters, and conveyed a clear message to the community. On behalf of the Republican Party, congratulations Jodi, we look forward to working with you and are excited to see what unique insight you’ll bring to the state party!

Finally, we had Vice President Mike Pence visit the Granite State, and it was a day jam packed with events! The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women hosted the Vice President for their annual Christmas Party at Labelle Winery, after which, he joined me in speaking at the Heritage Foundation’s ‘Save our Paycheck’ event!

Thank you to everyone who has been supportive of these events and I hope to see many of you at the Christmas / Holiday events taking place over the next few weeks!
**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| _**New Hampshire was rated #1 overall in freedom ranking by the CATO Institute. This study analyzes the overall combination of personal and economic freedoms. In the last 21 years, New Hampshire has consistently been the 1st or 2nd most free state according to the CATO Institute.**_[**_You can view the full rankings by clicking here._**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.freedominthe50states.org%2F/1/0100017da6d3f154-09f0dd7e-610a-4d5a-9705-3f8260e83d5e-000000/vcbaJcX2zFQd8FNqRhlg-JWLVeI=248)
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.freedominthe50states.org%2F/2/0100017da6d3f154-09f0dd7e-610a-4d5a-9705-3f8260e83d5e-000000/vtPZ2_Ei7AvkQ38Pe3BNtWbWnlA=248)
_**Majority Leader Osborne Comments:**_

“In 1945, New Hampshire adopted our state motto ‘Live Free or Die,’ as a constant reminder of the utmost importance of our rights. This phrase epitomizes New Hampshire’s commitment to freedom and individual liberty, so it should be no surprise that we are the national leader in empowering individuals to embrace the unalienable rights that we are endowed with.
“Last year, we made significant achievements in advancing the freedoms of Granite Staters. We empowered parents to make the best educational choices for their children by passing Education Freedom Accounts. We cut over $170 million in taxes and put money back in the pockets of all Granite Staters. Even with this progress, there is always more work to be done. In 2022, House Republicans will continue to expand individual liberties, fight an intrusive and overreaching federal government, and protect the New Hampshire Advantage.”

| **Morse: Biden Policies Make This Holiday Season Less Than Bright**
November 24, 2021
It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas, and for many of us who weren’t able to spend last year’s holidays with friends and family, it can’t come soon enough!
While the pandemic is not over, we are returning to normalcy and that is a very good thing.
But at the risk of sounding like a Grinch, the news isn’t all good. This holiday season is shaping up to be another challenging one for many New Hampshire families, as we are seeing a new set of problems, unrelated to the pandemic, that threaten to derail our holidays yet again.
First and foremost: Inflation. If you feel like your dollar isn’t going as far this year as it did last year, you’re not alone. When polled, most Americans have said inflation is the most serious issue we face today. In October, the rate of inflation was 6.2 percent, the highest it’s been in 30 years. Gas prices in New Hampshire are up more than a dollar a gallon since Biden took office. Grocery prices, car prices, and appliance prices are all up across the board as well. Shopping for Thanksgiving dinner this year is the most expensive it has ever been.
And that’s assuming that the store shelves aren’t empty. Supply chain issues and worker shortages are coming to a head. Container ships are sitting at docks around the country with no one to unload them. Stores and restaurants are cutting back operating hours, or shutting down completely.
The majority of people in these same polls put the blame squarely on the Biden administration and our federal delegation, and for good reason. Runaway spending and failed economic policies have forced the inflation rate up and the Democrats in Washington have failed to adequately address the real problems that Americans care about. Democrats have instead chosen to spend their time waging culture wars and threatening legal actions against parents with the audacity to question their local school boards and take interest in their child’s education.
Since Day One of his presidency, Joe Biden and the Democrats in Washington have sought to remake America into a country that few of us recognize, and even fewer wanted.
When President Biden visited our state a few weeks ago to sell his infrastructure bill, an interview with a Woodstock resident named Guy Hoover went viral on social media. Mr. Hoover was asked about the President coming to his town and expressed that he is far more concerned with being able to afford to heat his home this winter. He is far from alone. Home heating oil and natural gas prices are skyrocketing at the worst possible time.
These are the real concerns that real people have. These are the new worries that threaten to keep us from traveling to visit our families. These are the issues being discussed at kitchen tables and keeping parents up at night.
It’s time that Washington stops talking and starts listening.
**Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) is President of the New Hampshire Senate. He wrote this for New Hampshire Journal.
**

| **We hosted our annual state address on December 4th, 2021 with College Republicans from across the state. Each CR chapter gave updates on what is going on and what their goals are for next semester. We heard from two winners from our recent election cycle and heard from our CD1 candidates! We presented our Honorary Granite Lister awards and concluded with a photo with our amazing CRs and supporters! We thank you for coming and for supporting us!**

name: Election Alert
subject: Three vulnerable Republican senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team -- Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK President Biden's agenda, and we must _defeat_ McConnell's right-wing allies to fight back. **Here are THREE vulnerable Republicans who Democrats can defeat with your support:**

McConnell said he'll hold ANOTHER seat on the Supreme Court hostage if we don't defend our single-seat Senate majority.

But if we don't keep pace with Trump's megadonor base, it'll BADLY damage our chances against far-right, Trump-supporting Republicans like Marco Rubio, Ron Johnson, and Rand Paul.

This situation is dire: We will lose the Senate unless we turn our fundraising around _immediately_!

**We REFUSE to take off-days or abandon our fundraising goals in the face of Trump's megadonors. There is WAY too much at stake, so we'll ask one last time:**

**[Will you chip in to save Biden's Senate? name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: [COMMS] Cynthia speaks truth to power on Mehdi Hasan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Matt, Cynthia, doctors, activists, teachers, and more just finished night
ten of #SleepOutRI, and their message is gaining ground.

Last night, Cynthia joined the Mehdi Hasan Show on MSNBC to bring Rhode
Island’s housing crisis to the national stage.

Take a minute to watch Cynthia speak truth to power, and then, we need
your help:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3155?t=1003&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3155?t=1004&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]Can you forward this email to 3 of your friends and ask them to sign up
to learn more about this movement for housing justice, and our campaign to
win governing power in Rhode Island?

Cynthia and Matt are going to keep fighting and sleeping out until this
crisis is resolved. But the conditions outside are cold. Winter is cruel
and brutal. It snowed on Wednesday.

And yet it’s nothing compared to what our unhoused neighbors go through
every night — and our state leadership still doesn’t give a damn.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3155?t=1005&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]Help us spread the word and strengthen our movement for justice by
forwarding this email to three friends right now, show them this
interview, and STAY LOUD — the pressure is working.

Thank you for being here,

Team Matt and Cynthia

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3161?t=1006&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]DONATE

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx ]Privacy Policy

Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia

[4]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=316%2E43343%2EPxCDQx

clean_body: | | | | | This is a make-or-break moment, and Steve said I could count on this team to help me out. Here’s the situation: Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE Senate seat to regain control, and I’m his #1 target. Make no mistake: Democrats’ Senate majority hinges on Nevada. Here’s the problem: New polling shows me trailing my Trump-endorsed opponent by 3 points and national Republicans have already spent more than $3 million on attack ads to defeat me. Here’s the solution: I have a critical midnight fundraising goal but I’m currently $1,472 short of what I need to fight back against McConnell’s attacks. | | | | | | | | | | | | | I simply can't afford to miss this goal. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that I’m in severe danger of losing this race and CNN named me one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election. Now, back-to-back polls show me trailing my Trump-endorsed opponent, just as The Cook Political Report downgraded my chances of winning to toss-up. I didn’t become the first woman from Nevada and the first Latina in history elected to the U.S. Senate by backing down from a fight — and I’m not about to start. In 2016, the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat me, and thanks to grassroots supporters like you — we won. Nevada races are always tight, and this race is going to come down to a handful of votes. Your critical donation could be the difference between winning or losing Nevada and the Senate majority. | | | | | | | | | | | | ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. subject: 'Tis the Season
body:
Maine's Congressional Candidate needs your support | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b2b18f4e131a/tis-the-season?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# We're rapidly approaching an important deadline for our campaign and asking for your financial support.

**Please consider a donation before the year ends if you are able.**
I deeply appreciate any support you can give.

I’m running because our country is on the wrong track under the current leadership.

Our economic status is hurting working- and middle-class families. Our health care costs are too high. Gas and oil prices are out of control.

We need a positive change for Maine and America.

**No contribution is too small.
We can't do this alone.**

Thank you for considering my request
it's so important and will allow us to fight for a better America.

Ed Thelander

at Wells**

name: Congressman Doug Collins
subject: An Update From Me
body:
[](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-r/)
## Dear Patriot,
Doug here, we have accomplished great things for this country in the Conservative movement. During the Presidency of Donald Trump we were able to lower taxes, remove burdensome regulations from our small businesses, and bring our country to energy independence.HOWEVER, in the last 11 months Joe Biden and his administration are bent on not only turning around these victories but leading our country down a path of socialism and dependency. **I AM NOT TAKING IT** and I NEED YOUR help in fighting for the conservative causes that we believe in. Lisa and I know that you want to be a part of our coming conservative victory in the country.

I do believe however, that we must be prepared to take our message to everyone we can find to insure that the **LIBERAL** press and Democratic Congress are kept in check.**Since leaving Congress, I have not slowed down, I have sped up and want help lead the conservative resurgence!** I have written a [BOOK](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-y/) It describes the Democrat obsession with Donald Trump and how they damaged the institution of Congress in the process.Also, I am taking to the airwaves to give you the information and facts you need to help win the battle for the direction of our country. I have a [daily radio show](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-j/) and I am very excited to announce that I now have a [podcast.](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-t/) These are your tools to use to take the fight to the left. We must stay engaged and always fighting. Just as you saw me fight the liberal mob of _**NADLER, PELOSI, SCHIFF, and SCHUMER**_ I am fighting everyday to give you information you can use.**WILL YOU FIGHT with ME?** Get a copy of the [BOOK](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-i/) or subscribe and follow the [Podcast.](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-d/)I am thankful for your continued Support. I will also be sharing with you a regular newsletter that will go more in depth on various topics and giving you even more ways to win the political battle ahead of us.Keep FightingDoug Collins [](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-h/)
## **⬇ ️ Follow Doug on Social Media ⬇️**
[](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-k/)[](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-u/)[](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-x/) [Listen To My Podcast!](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-c/) [Get Your Copy Of My Book!](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-q/) [Listen To My Radio Show!](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-a/) [](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-f/) [ Share ](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-fb-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-z/) [ Tweet ](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-tw-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-v/) [ Forward ](https://dougcollins.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-bwltkdhku-53BE0E53-trddudhy-l-e) | [Preferences](https://dougcollins.updatemyprofile.com/r-trddudhy-53BE0E53-bwltkdhku-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-u-trddudhy-bwltkdhku-g/)

He thinks the cure to his nosediving economy is to push Americans to the unemployment line and stifle economic participation with mask and vaccine mandates.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: BRAND NEW EVENT: America Fest 2021
body:
Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event: AmericaFest 2021! This four-day event will be the largest co
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd37iokhe4gsnfo0gasg9ulv6gel4d3jeo83tkq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsebuo169qeejcbeo5dihfhutr8l7vtvo5luqrh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvr42s3grt3oh003p9r7brskl7v2t5u7lmgqm7u8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2v4ao9s40mrjg2fec58aodb3r363c5tqbffu9b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)**[?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z61hakbe70bn7jmsh75h93iedl42sagt8i34l8lo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqcmcitbkbd7durankg3andqnds8pc6mrdvggvvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlpja2q99cencmcpd3tek24158cqdn0fobt3crj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z464djlvrqdpjshhvfbj3megekh3gtrlo1shfkq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zird2ruko5acka8i91rv84lgotk62d70ou2pff18_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za05035l2jrv6o6isr5rl225ej29k4es2i5rr2jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk4uv60djogpcb699o0080m7tlldmlsvu7uemp00_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc2oqln5ru6o7uc72l27ennbln72em56kq5a2vc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh7c47mqqo986u7og8904l14ak8f6k7hku9gq180_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zhs67qppgmn97nuf9tl1ev3dai3b9oo1d6c2lnn8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkrfpieglpugj37qbie6smirt4imdrreb8imt6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob2cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Friend,

Are you going to activate your **[Trump Life Membership?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FMY92BStwCEnpCp4Ybo5jg&sysid=1)**

********SUPPORTER: Friend********
********MEMBERSHIP STATUS: PENDING
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT********
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19490%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f6K4iUPTsYY%2fq2K%2f24YSYQ&sysid=1)**

I just got off the phone with GOP Leadership - when I asked them if YOU had stepped up, they informed me that they hadn’t heard from you in a while. **Is this true?**

You were one of the Patriots I have always been able to count on _\- no matter what the Left-wing media and SOCIALIST SQUAD throw at me -_ which is why I’ve decided to hold your spot on the roster open until midnight tonight.

_We only do this for my TOP supporters, like YOU, so please do not share this very exclusive offer with ANYONE._

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlaovg5m3uev5tus684485d5vm0q8h01gbca428o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrm4dbjmorj1djmcjhb2pjmehin4cdicorb6c3lmeqeed9ksoq68ttgclqj0o77mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbacb7mao6cdb2mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpie4oj0c5j6aoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z31hr1i6p0vglpek66bru4jijro7ivpgjiog72u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2pdjod8ggl542dahuqaspqmt2na0gdblr6aph8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc3jjr1d0pah7t3mpe6hrn3j1r7g5toe4t7rpp38_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrm0e10obm430ugb46g0nhagkefmeg6h1ol0u8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)**[?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs47urbe4ph40d78gd4o7jcrsplcb22707vfia20_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4407urvks8mo1apt68kaum3q86cg90kd6nrproo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1ktv7eghut6m9snhrb7baoi4hc5s45vorrr7g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpa3igktr6in99lepvd8mkc65ptui0nmd955elqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zendmgqj1jatghs6su27gr8s1gre5kp0olhq2r20_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2gm2u3t6us0nd6v3arvfj62bi8dfi48fre0bhpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo0ra1bv42cbl094vi7htvqv5ddonrjp5e0n99jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2fdnqk4llgodl1kcgc77m822ph3ka5jgbi098l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuism30fm5ru9jgi57p0m3riifj1s20is5bhrif8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60ob6clh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zpu1c1pog3da84s2tj9ev42dte3o5chh5uf880so).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtufoacsik2blb1kccs7a843efds4bqa65fimvo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjh64o31cpim49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z98g8ckoodub301fcee84atcncupopiegmsr2peg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60pb0c3h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2n67121ttevosc8015m9sao1mkaumd7mr9t48ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60pb0c3h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq30kftph4ranf5p7ked93i1pt0ik8v7rcr0n2n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9h60pb0c3h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fauci Gain of Function Docs!
body:
Court Victory Against Biden Secrecy!

[INSIDE JW]

NEW DOCUMENTS SEEM TO DETAIL FAUCI AGENCY FUNDING OF GAIN OF FUNCTION
RESEARCH IN CHINA

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26472&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1NcEJwVDNianh0ZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

We now have proof that our tax dollars were dishonestly used by Dr.
Anthony Fauci’s agency to fund “gain of function” coronavirus
research.

We learned this in 221 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26438&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
of records we received from the Department of Health and Human
Services (HHS) that include a 2018 grant application for research
involving the coronavirus.

The grant application appears to describe “gain of function”
research involving RNA extractions from bats, experiments on viruses,
attempts to develop a chimeric virus, and efforts to genetically
manipulate the full-length bat SARSr-CoV WIV1 strain molecular clone.

Judicial Watch obtained the documents through a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=22826&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmloLXd1aGFuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
for records
of communications, contracts and agreements with the Wuhan Institute
of Virology. Our lawsuit specifically requests records about National
Institute of Health (NIH) grants that benefitted the Wuhan Institute
of Virology.

Here are some of the details.

On January 27, 2020, National Institute of Allergy and Infectious
Diseases (NIAID) official David Morens emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26439&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0xMC0xMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
Chief of Staff Greg Folkers in a heavily redacted thread, writing:

[S]ome background on our support of the Ecohealth group (Peter Daszak
et al), which has for years been among the biggest players in
coronavirus work, also in collaboration with Ralph Baric, Ian Lipkin
and others. [Redacted].

NIAID has been funding Peter’s group for coronavirus work in China
for the past 5 years through [grant] R011R01A|110964: “Understanding
the Risk of Bat Coronavirus Emergence.” That’s now been renewed,
with a specific focus to identify cohorts of people highly exposed to
bats in China, and work out if they’re getting sick from CoVs....
Collaborators include Wuhan Institute of Virology (currently working
on the nCoV) and Ralph Baric. The results of the work to date include:

* [Redacted]
* Discovered Swine Acute Diarrheal Syndrome Virus (SADS-CoV) killing
>25,000 pigs in Guangdong Province (Published in Nature)
* Found SARS-related CoVs that can bind to human cells (Published in
Nature), and that cause SARS-like disease in humanized mouse models.
* [Redacted]

Also, prior to the above R01, Peter’s folks worked under an R01 with
Eun-Park as Program Officer on viral discovery in bats, and originally
identified SARS-CoV as having a likely origin in bats (published in
Science).

Folkers forwards the message to Anthony Fauci and others.

In a “Notice of Award
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26440&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0xMi0xOC9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz
dated July 13, 2020, the NIH increased the amount of NIH money going
to Peter Daszak’s firm, EcoHealth Alliance, by $369,819 with a
project period that runs from June 1, 2014, through June 30, 2025, for
Daszak’s project “Understanding the Risk of Bat Coronavirus
Emergence.

EcoHealth was to receive $637,980 in each of the years 2019 through
2024 under the grant.

The award’s writers specifically direct funds “for activity with
Wuhan Institute of Virology in the amount of $76,301” and “for
activity with Institute of Pathogen Biology [located in China] in the
amount of $75,301.” Funds also went to the University of North
Carolina-Chapel Hill. The award’s writers also indicate that
research associated with the award was also being conducted at East
China Normal University in China and to Duke-NUS Medical School in
Singapore.

The specialists overseeing the award note that, “This award may
include collaborations with and/or between foreign organizations.”
The specialists also note that award grantees using “Highly
Pathogenic Agents” “may warrant a biocontainment safety facility
of BSL3 or higher.” The grantee is also required to report “Any
changes in the use of the Agent(s) or Toxin(s) including its
restricted experiments that have resulted in a change in the required
biocontainment level, and any resultant change in location.” The NIH
Grants Management Specialist overseeing the award was Shaun W. Gratton
and the NIH Program Official was Erik J. Stemmy. Of the 17
“Senior/Key Personnel” assigned as researchers on the project,
seven worked at Chinese institutions.

The site locations in an EcoHealth grant application
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26441&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0yMC0yMjMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
submitted November 5, 2018, for coronavirus research included
EcoHealth Alliance in New York City, the University of North Carolina
in Chapel Hill, the Wuhan Institute of Virology, and the Institute of
Pathogen Biology in Beijing, China. Among the “aims
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26442&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0yMC00MS9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz
listed, the applicants write, “We will sequence receptor binding
domains (spike proteins) to identify viruses with the highest
potential for spillover which we will include in our experimental
investigations.” In the third “aim”, they continue “We will
use S protein sequence data, infectious clone technology, in vitro and
in vivo infection experiments and analysis of receptor binding to test
the hypothesis that % divergence thresholds in S protein sequences
predict spillover potential.”

In a description of the Wuhan lab, the writers of the application note
that, “The Wuhan Institute of Virology is a World Health
Organization collaborating center” and had a “long-time (>15
years) partnership with EcoHealth Alliance.”

In his “personal statement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26443&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy00Mi00Ni9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz

years of NIH-funded research.” Among his awards, Daszak notes he was
a 1999 recipient of the CDC’s “Meritoriouos service award,” had
a species of centipedes named after him (“_Crytops daszaki_”), as
well as having a “new parasite species” named after himself

“Collaborating with virologists in China, we have isolated and
characterized SARS-like CoVs from bats that use the same host cell

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26446&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy01Ni02MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]

Baric writes that “Several CoV infectious cDNA clones are available
in the lab, including SARS-CoV, MERS-CoV, conventional human and model

However, in July 2020, HHS wrote a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26452&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yZXB1YmxpY2Fucy1vdmVyc2lnaHQuaG91c2UuZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDIxLzA1L0Vjby1IZWFsdGgtTGFiLWxldHRlci1KdWx5LTgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
to EcoHealth Alliance regarding funding:

[T]he NIH has received reports that the Wuhan Institute of Virology
(WIV), a subrecipient of EcoHealth Alliance under R01AI110964, has
been conducting research at its facilities in China that pose serious
bio-safety concerns and, as a result, create health and welfare
threats to the public in China and other countries, including the
United States.

***

We have concerns that WIV has not satisfied safety requirements under
the award, and that EcoHealth Alliance has not satisfied its
obligations to monitor the activities of its subrecipient to ensure
compliance.

***

Therefore, effective the date of this letter, July 8, 2020, NIH is
suspending all activities ... until such time as these concerns have
been addressed to NIH’s satisfaction.

Among the budget items
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26453&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBnLTExNS0xMTgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
in the EcoHealth grant application, was one for supplies for “bats
trapping” and “viral transport media.” The total salary, wages
and fringe benefits to be paid to the “Senior/Key Person” over the
5-year project totaled $1,118,565.00.

The NIAID funds
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26454&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBnLTE0MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to be allocated to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for this project
for each of the years 2019-2020, 2020-2021, 2021-2022, 2022-2023, and
2023-2024 was $76,301, or a total over five years of $381,505.

The Wuhan Institute of Virology’s role in the project
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26455&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0xNTMtMTU0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
overseen by Dr. Shi Zhengli would include “running RNA extractions
for 1,000 bats per year (two samples per bat: rectal and blood) in
each year of the project,” costing $6,214 per year. The Wuhan
Institute of Virology also requested “support for in vitro
experiments using pseudoviruses carrying the spike proteins ... or
live viruses in cell lines of different origins, binding affinity
assays between the spike proteins ... and different cellular receptor
molecules, and humanized mice experiments.”

In a discussion of their research to date, the grant applicants wrote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26456&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0xNzktMTkwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
“In collaboration with Ralph Baric (UNC), we used the SARS-CoV
reverse genetics system ... to generate a chimeric virus with a
mouse-adapted SARS-CoV backbone expressing SHC014 S protein with 10%
sequence divergence from SARS-DoV S. This chimera replicated in human
airway epithelium, using the human ACE2 receptor to enter cells ...
THUS, SARS-COVS WITH DIVERSE VARIANTS OF SL-COV S PROTEIN WITHOUT
DELETIONS IN THE RBD CAN USE HUMAN ACE2 AS RECEPTOR FOR CELL ENTRY.”
[Emphasis in original]

In a discussion of the rationale of one of the aims of the project,
the applicants write, “we aim to expand the known diversity of
SARSr-CoVs by over 125 strains, targeting 10-25% S protein divergence
that we predict infers high spillover risk and evasion of immune
therapeutic and vaccine efficacy.” They continue, “We will ...
construct chimeric SARSr-CoVs using the WIV1 backbone and these S
genes as done previously.” They go on, “Construction of chimeric
SARSr-CoV viruses: infectious clones with the S gene of novel
SARSr-CoVs and the SARSr-Cov WIV1 genome backbone using the reverse
genetic system developed in our previous R01.”

In a section titled “P3CO Research
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26457&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBncy0yMDktMjExL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=,
the applicants write: “Recognizing the implementation of new gain of
function research guidelines under P3CO [Potential Pandemic Pathogen
Care and Oversight], SARS-CoV and MERS-CoV are subject to these
guidelines, and as such, reverse genetic studies are subject to review
... IMPORTANTLY, WE ARE NOT PROPOSING TO GENETICALLY MANIPULATE
SARS-COV over the course of this proposal. However, we are proposing
to genetically manipulate the full-length bat SARSr-CoV WIV1 strain
molecular clone during the course of the proposal, which is not a
select agent, has not been shown to cause human infections, and has
not been shown to be transmissible between humans.” [Emphasis in
original]

In an October 31, 2018, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXd1aGFuLWF1Z3VzdC0zMS0yMDIxLTAwNjk2LXBnLTIxNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
from the director of the Wuhan Institute of Virology, Dr. Yangyi Wang,
to Peter Daszak, president of EcoHealth Alliance, requesting
permission to take part in the NIAID funded project, he tells Daszak:

Understanding and preventing exposure and transmission of zoonotic
diseases from wildlife to humans remains a high priority for
prevention of pandemics. In our discussion with EcoHealth Alliance, we
have agreed to participate in activities that will strengthen the
ability of China and other countries in the region to respond to
epidemic disease outbreaks - particularly those of animal origin. To
assist in this study, we will provide participating laboratories in
China with human samples both new and archived and support research in
bat coronaviruses.

We at Wuhan Institute of Virology, Chinese Academy of Sciences, look
forward to our continued collaborations with the EcoHealth Alliance
team and working further on this worthwhile study.

In my view, these new disclosures detail not only a cover-up but
potential fraud and deserve a criminal investigation.

This is the latest discovery in our investigation of our government
and the Wuhan lab.

In August, we obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=25664&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW5paC13dWhhbi1pbnN0LWF1Z3VzdC0yMDIxLTAwNjk2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
from HHS that include an “urgent for Dr. Fauci” email chain citing
ties between the Wuhan lab and the taxpayer-funded EcoHealth Alliance.
The government emails also report that the foundation of U.S.
billionaire Bill Gates worked closely with the Chinese government to
pave the way for Chinese-produced medications to be sold outside China
and help “raise China’s voice of governance by placing
representatives from China on important international counsels as
high-level commitment from China.”

In July, we obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=25336&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvd3VoYW4tbGFiLWZhdWNpLWdyYW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
from NIAID officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of
Virology revealing significant collaborations and funding that began
in 2014. The records revealed that NIAID gave nine China-related
grants to EcoHealth Alliance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=25283&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNvaGVhbHRoYWxsaWFuY2Uub3JnLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
to
research coronavirus emergence in bats and was the NIH’s top issuer
of grants to the Wuhan lab itself.

In June, we announced FOIA lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=25135&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]

emails and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane

In October 2020, we uncovered emails

MORE INFORMATION SURFACES ON MYSTERIOUS ASHLEY BIDEN INVESTIGATION

The diary of Ashley Biden, President Biden’s daughter, is at the
center of a legal storm involving police in Florida, the FBI and
prosecutors in New York. It raises serious questions abuses of the
First Amendment by the Biden administration.

We now have more details. We received a six-page incident report and
bodycam footage from the Delray Beach, FL, Police Department,
detailing the turnover of records related to the diary and/or other
property of Ashley Biden, daughter of President Joe Biden.

According to the incident report, an attorney turned in “possibly
stolen luggage” to the Delray Beach PD which contained “documents
and envelopes in folders” with the name Ashley Biden. The Delray
Beach PD included bodycam footage of an attorney handing over the
items.

The Delray Beach PD also noted in the incident report that the FBI had
said it would “take over the case.”

We obtained the documents and bodycam video in response to a November
16, 2021, Florida Public Records Request for:

* All records related to the alleged theft and/or disappearance of a
diary and/or other property from Ashley Blazer Biden...circa 2020
reportedly from a Delray Beach residence. Such records shall include,
but not be limited to, incident reports, investigative reports,
recordings, photos, telephone logs and messages, email messages, and
witness statements.
* All records of communications, including emails and text messages,
sent to and from Delray Beach Police Department officials regarding
the alleged theft/disappearance of Ms. Biden’s diary and/or other
property.

The incident report was filed on November 8, 2020. Project Veritas
reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26468&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tLzIwMjEvMTEvcHJvamVjdC12ZXJpdGFzLXJhaWRzLWZlZHMtaW52ZXN0aWdhdGluZy1hc2hsZXktYmlkZW4tZGlhcnktYXMtc3RvbGVuLXByb3BlcnR5LWNhc2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
obtained Ashley Biden’s diary in October 2020, a week and a half
before the 2020 presidential election.

The “possibly stolen luggage” was reported to the Delray Beach PD
on Sunday, November 8, 2020 at 11:21AM. It was reported as a
“Suspicious Incident.” The report indicates “BWC/In Use/Body
Worn Cam” and under the “Victims” section, in the field for
number of victims, they list zero.

In a print-out for the case for “Additional Name List,” the Delray
Beach PD lists Ashley Biden, but provides no additional information.

In the incident report, Delray Beach PD Officer Nicole Guerriero
explained that she met with Adam Leo Bantner II “at the DBPD [Delray
Beach Police Department] lobby in reference to property that he wanted
to turn over to the DBPD.” She continued:

“Adam, who is an attorney, advised that his client, who Adam refused
to divulge the identity of, gave Adam some property (a duffle bag and
a piece of luggage) that his client obtained from an unknown person.
Adam’s client told Adam that the property is possibly stolen and he
got it from an unknown person at a hotel which the client refused to
share as well. It was also learned that the items belonged to a person
named ‘Ashley Biden.’ A brief check of the property in the luggage
revealed that there were some documents and envelopes in folders that
were loosely spread in the bags which read the name Ashley Biden. The
documents all had different addresses, but all had the same name of
Ashley Biden. The bags were checked for safety and all the contents
were left inside the bags and secured in DBPD. The FBI was contacted
and advised that they would respond to the DBPD, collect the
belongings and take over the case.”

In a Case Supplemental Report on November 8, 2020, “at approximately
4:24 p.m.,” Officer Guerriero notes: “I met with FBI Special Agent
Healey and turned over a blue duffle bag and a black suitcase into his
custody. Both contained miscellaneous clothing and personal
property.”

The website Nationalfile.com
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26469&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9uYXRpb25hbGZpbGUuY29tL2JvbWJzaGVsbC1uZXcteW9yay10aW1lcy1mYmktY29uZmlybS1sZWdpdGltYWN5LW9mLWFzaGxleS1iaWRlbi1kaWFyeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
reported a New York Times story about the investigation of the diary:

The article claims that the federal investigators are comprised of FBI
agents and “federal prosecutors in Manhattan who work on public
corruption matters” on behalf of the Southern District of New York.
The investigation was seemingly opened by then-Attorney General Bill
Barr, after a Biden family representative allegedly reported in
October 2020 that the diary, along with “several” of Ashley
Biden’s personal items had been stolen in a burglary.

This is contrary to the information provided to National File by a
Project Veritas whistleblower, who explained that the diary was left
at an address where Joe Biden’s daughter used to stay....

In a video posted to social media
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26470&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9uTnBidnNTN0swZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
Project Veritas’ James O’Keefe notes that Ashley Biden’s
father’s FBI may be setting a dangerous precedent by, apparently,
pursuing criminal charges against reporters for the crime of gathering
information from sources.

The FBI raided the home
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26471&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvZmJpLXJhaWRzLWhvbWUtamFtZXMtb2tlZWZlLWFzaGxleS1iaWRlbi1kaWFyeS1wcm9qZWN0LXZlcml0YXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
of Project Veritas founder James O’Keefe on November 6, 2021,
purportedly as part of a federal investigation into the "stolen"
diary.

The Biden Justice Department’s abuse of James O’Keefe and Project
Veritas stinks to high heaven, and these new documents raise new
concerns that O’Keefe is being improperly targeted.

JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: DELAWARE SUPREME COURT DEMANDS MORE ANSWERS ON
BIDEN DOCUMENT SECRECY

We have a victory in our lawsuit to learn what Joe Biden is hiding
about his days in the Senate.

The Delaware Supreme Court ruled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26436&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1kZWwtc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1vcGluaW9uLTAwMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
this week that the University of Delaware must provide more
information justifying its decision to keep secret its deal to house
and restrict access to the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden.

The high court reversed the Delaware Superior Court and found that the
University of Delaware had not carried its burden justifying its
refusal to produce records. The case returns to the Delaware Superior
Court for further proceedings.

We and The Daily Caller News Foundation initially filed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=26437&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy11ZGVsYXdhcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
the July 2020 state
FOIA lawsuit after the University of Delaware denied their requests on
April 30, 2020, for all of Biden’s Senate records and for records
about the preservation and any proposed release of the records,
including communications with Biden or his representatives (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. University of Delaware_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=19548&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLXYtZGVsYXdhcmUtZG9qLXUtb2YtZGVsYXdhcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz],
No. N20A-07-001 MMJ (Del. Super.)).

Tara Reade, who has accused Biden of sexually assaulting her in 1993
when she worked as a staff assistant to the then-senator, has said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=19546&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9ob21lbmV3cy9jYW1wYWlnbi80OTcxNjMtdGFyYS1yZWFkZXMtYXR0b3JuZXktYXNrcy1iaWRlbi10by1hdXRob3JpemUtc2VhcmNoLW9mLWhpcy1zZW5hdGUtcGFwZXJzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that she believes a workplace discrimination and harassment complaint
she filed against Biden at the time may be in the records housed at
the University of Delaware. Biden also admitted to communicating with
Vladimir Putin
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=19547&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5kZXBlbmRlbnQuY28udWsvbmV3cy93b3JsZC9hbWVyaWNhcy91cy1lbGVjdGlvbi9qb2UtYmlkZW4tc2VuYXRlLXBhcGVycy1kZWxhd2FyZS1hcmNoaXZlLWluZm9ybWF0aW9uLWE5NDk1MTQ2Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
and other foreign leaders when he was a United State Senator.

In January 2021, we filed an appeal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57351&L=22007&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZGMtYmlkZW4tcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to
the Delaware Supreme Court, asking for a reversal of the opinion of
the Delaware Superior Court, which blocked a state FOIA request for
access to records about President Biden’s senatorial records held by
the University of Delaware. Biden’s papers include more than 1,850
boxes of archival records from his Senate career.

In its opinion, the Delaware Supreme Court ruled that the state’s
open records law requires the University must provide additional
information, under oath, to justify its refusal to produce records
about its dealings with Biden:

[U]nless it is clear on the face of the request that the demanded
records are not subject to FOIA, satisfaction of Section 10005(c)’s
burden of proof requires a statement made under oath. Such a reading
of the statutory text is also supported by the statute’s purpose.
FOIA safeguards a democratic society by ensuring the meetings and
records of governmental entities are available to the public....

Therefore, if a public body is to deny citizens an opportunity to
“observe the performance of public officials and to monitor the
decisions that are made by such officials,” the public body must
satisfy its burden of proof under FOIA in a manner that tracks the
seriousness of the statute’s purpose and policy. Statements made
under oath, such as through a sworn affidavit, accomplish that goal;
they bear earmarks of reliability and instill a measure of seriousness
in the affiant by subjecting the affiant to the risk of penalty of
perjury.

Regarding the reversal of the Superior Court’s decision, the opinion
instructs:

Because the University’s factual assertions to the Deputy Attorney
General and the Superior Court were not made under oath and do not
describe the efforts taken to identify responsive documents, they are
not sufficient to meet FOIA’s burden of proof. On remand, the
Superior Court shall determine whether the University has satisfied
its burden of proof based on competent evidence in accordance with
this ruling. The Superior Court is granted leave to accept additional
evidence or submissions as it deems necessary and appropriate.

“The University of Delaware should stop trying to hide records from
the president's decades of political activities. They should be
public. This level of corruption should not be happening in
America,” Daily Caller News Foundation President Neil Patel said.

This decision is a remarkable pushback on the University of
Delaware’s secret deal with Joe Biden to hide his Senate records. In
the meantime, why won’t President Biden simply release his Senate
records? What is he trying to hide?

Until next week...
