name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci is hysterical!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988638:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988638:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988638:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
__
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988638:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988639:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988640:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988641:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988642:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)
The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58988638:JXyjU8ENp:m:1:3298722022:28A8639054A57BF9C80944D539504482:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

# Candidate For The Wisconsin 2nd Congressional District
---
| | |
---|---
|
Hello Peter,

On December 8, there was a hearing with the Committee on Campaigns and Elections held at our Wisconsin State Capitol. I have linked the WisEye video for you to watch if you are interested. [Hearing](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UCVbOcGIaw7Ao-dVwJmg8kY5-IzaUX7NP7sYF4MkRaBEMbzI5yIXY5bjL3gq2lo0koTfQh5negGm1ODHWDXLfX53RIdo3JvE0XyMUE9XwVvq3FQIjqLhVd_HzCKtkvKRytCM-bEb_TtyUtHyLTUiQUC7deovXblXzMHR8dhTdKIUfy-hxHyZOiFgf4isv4clUkGlqHrQCz9zzduwXZhxBbG_ssSGHtpl&c=Oq3a6zasnlYEQcZTUQf9flj1tAVEsie2kzbUdQe49ZhDxfkxHd_-Kw==&ch=mYj8FkPRmq2_CAXngwTrpCMHDu_PJT1GgkWxqnY_AKoGBS079bZYxg==)

It is well known among the people of Wisconsin that the integrity of our elections is of the utmost importance to preserve our free nation! It is the Number 1 issue on the minds of every group that I speak with on the campaign trail. These hearings should be attended by every representative that is interested in the concerns of the people.

Sadly, Rep. Brandtjen, whom we all know as the champion for our cause there at the capitol, was joined by only two of her fellow Republican committee members... HALF OF THE REPUBLICANS ON THE COMMITTEE WERE NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING! And only 2 other Republicans attended the hearing.

We not only need to elect Republicans to represent us in 2022 - we need to elect Republicans that are not afraid to stand up for what is most important to the people! Some may say that to say this is divisive to the party, but the people are what make up the party, and we are united in the cause of Election Integrity! We need to bridge the divide between the People and their Representatives!

I have been in support of the Audit from the beginning, and I will not back down! In a time of increased technology, crime, and political tension, the People need to KNOW that our elections are free and fair! For me to make a difference, though, I need your help to get elected! As this year draws to a close, and we enter the year of the election, we need to be able to start out stronger than ever. That will take each and every one of us putting it all on the line for our freedom, our country, our home!

Make a donation today to the candidate that has proven that she will listen to the people, the candidate that will not back down no matter the obstacle!

Charity Barry

subject: Worried we could fall behind

body:

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39575880/320442469/-367306429?refcode=20211211_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzhlNGVhMi05ZTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-SSU9eYV7kZQ2eYdEVav3M1fwP-oRWr-8jqZMrPJLY=)

| | Derek, I have an urgent update and I wanted you to hear it from me directly.

GOP super PACs have MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves with attack ad campaigns – and now, polling shows me neck and neck with Donald Trump's handpicked candidate.

Experts at POLITICO say defending our razor-thin Democratic majority in the Senate hinges on keeping Georgia blue. That's why the GOP is zeroing in on me as their TOP target for defeat – and why Trump's allies are flooding MILLIONS into my opponent's campaign to defeat me and flip Georgia red.

Republicans know they could retake Senate control if they win this race – so they're doing whatever it takes to make it happen. I'm fighting for our progressive priorities in the Senate, but if we don't have the resources we need to fight back against this surge in GOP spending, I'm worried we could fall behind and put our Senate majority at risk.

That's why we set a goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight, but with time running out, we're on track to fall short. There’s no way we win this race without your support – so please, Derek, I'm personally asking:

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Asking for a quick favor this AM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1683%2E3611125%2E7jjpS_ ][IMG]

Morning, folks!

I’m up early today, drinking my coffee and looking over our fundraising
numbers. My team says we’re in a bit of a rough patch and I’m starting to
get pretty worried.

We’re way off track for our ambitious $150,000 end-of-year FEC goal. If we
fall short right before our report goes public, you can bet McConnell and
my Republican opponents will think Ohio’s Senate seat is ripe for the
taking.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6251?t=1007&akid=1683%2E3611125%2E7jjpS_ ]We can’t let that happen, team. So I’m humbly asking if
you’ll make a donation of any amount today to help us catch up before it’s
too late. If we can raise $8,000 by the end of the day, I’ll feel a lot
better about where we are.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6252?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1683%2E3611125%2E7jjpS_ ]Donate Now

I’m so grateful for your support. Your grassroots donation allows us to
take on the tough fights and overcome the right-wing attacks to win this
battleground race. When we flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate
majority, we’ll have you to thank.

Thanks for all you do,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6252?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1683%2E3611125%2E7jjpS_ ]Photo of Tim

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziptnim3ga0g38vccfmknsh4vc4su1n5kcuskfkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gm0oj2c3h2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8jald2ebqkpnfdu5kesi2mo6s2au2brtnpmu5s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gm0oj2c3h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2rtve310drnh64o7a2obguiitiaeh2as2dp9o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gm0oj2c3h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ellen Goodmann Miller via, RasForIowa.com
subject: Hi, friend 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
If you've driven with Ras, you won't be surprised when he stops to help with car trouble. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39575996/320443359/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTZlODQzNS1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3tMtYBbEdDSe-p8juanlg3cgM24qSeG79J1haUih7Y=)
Hi, friend 👋 My name is Ellen Goodmann Miller. If we haven't met yet, I'm proud to be serving as the Political Director for Ras' campaign.

**By now you probably know that we're not running a traditional campaign.** Like Ras, I am a lifelong Iowan. We know that the way to reach people isn’t on the phone or through ads. In Iowa, we do it by meeting them in person, looking them in the eye, and having real conversations. That’s where we find common ground and how we make change.

Ras is as Iowa as it gets. He knows our public education system in and out. He is as at home in camouflage hunting pheasants as he is in his mom’s church. He grills most months of the year. He’s lost students to gun violence. He can go into “red” and “blue” spaces and leave with new friends. He can speak to everyone at the table.

And he does.

If Democrats want a new playbook on how to flip a state -- follow Ras. Invest in Ras. He gets it.

And so, we’re continuing to hit the road to visit Iowans in all the beautiful regions of our home state that we love. As my colleagues can attest, it’s always an adventure on the campaign trail with Ras.

He slows down to point out every piece of public land in the state and plans how he can return to hunt or fish.

He stops to help anyone with car trouble. No matter what.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39575997/320443360/-73891749?refcode=em-121121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTZlODQzNS1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3tMtYBbEdDSe-p8juanlg3cgM24qSeG79J1haUih7Y=)
It’s nearly impossible to peel him away from an antique fair.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39575998/320443361/-73891749?refcode=em-121121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTZlODQzNS1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3tMtYBbEdDSe-p8juanlg3cgM24qSeG79J1haUih7Y=)
He knows the lyrics to every song by Adele.

One of the greatest gifts on the campaign trail is getting to know Ras’s amazing wife, kids, and extended family. Our daughters have become fast friends.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39575999/320443362/-73891749?refcode=em-121121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTZlODQzNS1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3tMtYBbEdDSe-p8juanlg3cgM24qSeG79J1haUih7Y=)
Running a campaign like ours takes time and money. We know we can lead Iowa and the country in making historic change. But we need your help. I’m asking:

[**Will you please chip in $5, $15, or even $50 today? It'll keep us on the road to meet more Democrats and voters across the state. Thanks in advance for helping us meet the mark on our $2,500 end-of-week goal. We're still coming up $1,489 short.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39576000/320443363/-73891749?refcode=em-121121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTZlODQzNS1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X3tMtYBbEdDSe-p8juanlg3cgM24qSeG79J1haUih7Y=)

Grateful for your consideration and I look forward to working alongside you soon.

Ellen Goodmann Miller
Political Director
Ras for Iowa

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: Codify Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
We need to take steps now to codify Roe v. Wade and enshrine every American’s right to reproductive freedom into law before it’s too late. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39576045/320443791/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzN2NiMi1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msrdCkUtIUQRlyZXO9FaBoyt5nOHPX_bVV69IEV7Kg4=&emci=f3d84d71-ed59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2f037cb2-a15a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Team: This week, Governor Tony Evers was forced to veto FIVE bills that would have restricted access to abortion here in Wisconsin. With the GOP making a full court press to rollback access to safe abortions – and a conservative Supreme Court set to rule on the future of Roe v. Wade – we know where this is headed. **We need to take steps now to codify Roe v. Wade and enshrine every American’s right to reproductive freedom into law before it’s too late. As your Senator, I will fight like hell to codify Roe v. Wade, and make sure that every American has the right to access the reproductive care that they need.[_Sign on now to join me in calling on the Senate to codify Roe and defend reproductive freedom now!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39576047/320443793/-1607872457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzN2NiMi1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msrdCkUtIUQRlyZXO9FaBoyt5nOHPX_bVV69IEV7Kg4=&emci=f3d84d71-ed59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2f037cb2-a15a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39576050/320443795/-1607872457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzN2NiMi1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msrdCkUtIUQRlyZXO9FaBoyt5nOHPX_bVV69IEV7Kg4=&emci=f3d84d71-ed59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2f037cb2-a15a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813)** As a woman, a mother, and a doctor, I can say with full certainty that laws passed to restrict access to reproductive care won’t stop people from getting abortions – they will only stop poor people from getting safe abortions. Those with resources and connections will still be able to access the services they need, while those without may have to risk everything for back alley procedures that could put their lives at risk. **Republicans across the country have made it their mission to end abortion. The right to bodily autonomy is incredibly important and this attack on that right must be stopped.[_Let’s finally Codify Roe and protect the right to abortion for good. If you’re with me, sign my petition now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39576052/320443798/-1607872457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzN2NiMi1hMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msrdCkUtIUQRlyZXO9FaBoyt5nOHPX_bVV69IEV7Kg4=&emci=f3d84d71-ed59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2f037cb2-a15a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813)** Thank you for standing with me,
Dr. Gillian Battino

clean_body: We need to take steps now to codify Roe v. Wade and enshrine every American’s right to reproductive freedom into law before it’s too late. | | Team: This week, Governor Tony Evers was forced to veto FIVE bills that would have restricted access to abortion here in Wisconsin. With the GOP making a full court press to rollback access to safe abortions – and a conservative Supreme Court set to rule on the future of Roe v. Wade – we know where this is headed. We need to take steps now to codify Roe v. Wade and enshrine every American’s right to reproductive freedom into law before it’s too late. As your Senator, I will fight like hell to codify Roe v. Wade, and make sure that every American has the right to access the reproductive care that they need. As a woman, a mother, and a doctor, I can say with full certainty that laws passed to restrict access to reproductive care won’t stop people from getting abortions – they will only stop poor people from getting safe abortions. Those with resources and connections will still be able to access the services they need, while those without may have to risk everything for back alley procedures that could put their lives at risk. Republicans across the country have made it their mission to end abortion. The right to bodily autonomy is incredibly important and this attack on that right must be stopped. Thank you for standing with me, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. Gillian built her career on integrity, advocacy, and action, and she’s ready to put that skill set to work in the U.S. Senate! It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . = Dr. Gillian Battino has dedicated her life’s work to bettering the world and continues that commitment every day. Gillian spent 20+ years serving the people of Wisconsin and helping women in the fight against breast cancer. She has seen, up close and personal, the difference that access to quality health care can make. =** Gillian Battino for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 292 Wausau, WI 54402-0292 United States Paid for by Battino for U.S. Senate

---
| I wouldn't be reaching out this Saturday if it wasn't critical for our mission. You see, the Left has been attacking us on all fronts recently...
They're terrified of our movement, and our ideas that empower PEOPLE, not the bureaucracies of government and the elites in society.
So they've been turning up the heat in their attacks against us - they're banking that will stop you from making sure we CRUSH them next year, along with their far-left fantasies of an America Last Woketopia!
We have to show them that our movement isn't going anywhere and that when our backs are against the wall, that's when we fight for our nation the hardest.
So let's keep up that fight today... If we do, we can reach our goals and deliver a tremendous America First victory in 2022!
Keep Up the Fight! name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Come Join me at my Christmas Meet and Greet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I want to invite you, your family, your neighbors, and your friends to attend
my Christmas Meet and Greet this Friday, December 17th at 6 pm! I'll be
discussing my campaign, why I'm running for Congress in Texas' 38th
Congressional district, the issues I will fight for, and will answer any
questions you have!

The Meet and Greet will take place at Market Street Cafe in Tomball, Texas
from 6:00 - 8:00 PM. Please see the flyer for exact details. I hope to see you
there!

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

clean_body: | = Folks — We know you’re busy, so we’ll keep this quick: Michael’s opponents are running attack ads to distort his record. With multiple Republicans running against him — including wealthy and self-funding candidates — we are being outspent in Colorado. We’re counting on grassroots support from people like you, team, to fight misinformation and spread the word about what Michael has achieved: Tax cuts for Colorado’s families and a massive reduction in child poverty; Expanding access to high-speed internet and fighting climate change; A historic infrastructure investment that will create good-paying jobs, grow the economy and build opportunities for the next generation Pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to the Bennet Defense Fund to fend off attacks against Michael’s record and keep Colorado blue. We’re a grassroots-driven campaign, so your support means everything to us. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: I got my first job at age 12 washing dishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We need more working people in Washington
#

Folks,
Growing up, I watched my mom struggle almost every month to cover the rent.
I know first-hand what it's like to face an eviction notice.
I know the panic of packing everything I own in plastic bags to hurry to the next place.
I can't stress this enough: We need more working people in Washington.
People who know these struggles personally. People for whom these decisions aren't hypothetical.
I'm in this race because no one like me has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate.
I got my first job at age 12 washing dishes because I had to, and I ran for State Representative because no one was listening to families like ours.
**And now I'm running for U.S. Senate for the same reason. But I can't get there alone — it’s going to take a big coalition of folks like us standing together to bring about real change.**
[That’s why I’m asking: Could you chip in a few bucks to fuel our campaign today? It really would mean the world to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39577652/320452095/-360183459?refcode2=1298732a-ab5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211211-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjk4NzMyYS1hYjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR38TvdkOp_ZnruPeeSPOghgtIMk_ApSU18G_sPP-UQ=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39577653/320452096/-360183459?refcode2=1298732a-ab5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211211-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjk4NzMyYS1hYjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR38TvdkOp_ZnruPeeSPOghgtIMk_ApSU18G_sPP-UQ=)**
Your donation will put us that much closer to finally delivering a government that works for us working people.
Thanks for being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for everything you do.
All my best,
Malcolm

subject: missing response from dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
Who is your pick for Arizona's next governor?
| | |
---
| | **URGENT LIVE POLL | 11:59 P.M. DEADLINE**
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD. In this
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdf8tn8r9c46ic7l6829j3qp2qliv89e22f97en8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gmaor4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7mn6g9f4p5snoimkdlruim62dts3lmv6qbq88g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gmaor4cph2bs)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuise928u068ui2nrl1niv85v1962m09gvcojrto_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gmaor4cph2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8pl622oabm6crr9dc2ltndl345tj371vh00vm8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gmaor4cph2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3r7ofj3v3bb4pf1m7bdmd4hjrve209glh371q8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9gmaor4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onh6ur38p746aqj9orim1q3ddr4c9h61oticpp36tplmgobctjl6cq7co5lmmo70oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1n46in1fcemceulrqb91i01ic7rh7vh1tn7su9o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjh62pb3chj649fg)

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

Ohio’s Public Utilities Commission, with the help of Mike DeWine’s allies and Republican legislators in Columbus, sent kickbacks and favors to the FirstEnergy power company after FirstEnergy paid the PUCO chairman a $4 million bribe just weeks before he took the job. = Of course, it doesn’t end there. The GOP-controlled legislature and DeWine passed HB6 — a bill that actually would’ve made hardworking Ohioans pay to prop up failing FirstEnergy power plants. It’s absolutely ridiculous. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How Politicians Cause Rising Prices – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132162?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how much prices rose this year? From gas to groceries, it’s obvious we are now paying way more for things compared to twelve months ago.

Why have prices increased? **Inflation is what happens when there is too much money chasing too few goods and services. **

There has been something like a 40% increase in the number of dollars in circulation (M2) in America compared to two years ago. If you measure the amount of money more narrowly (M1), the increase has been even more pronounced.
---
|
---
_Increase in M1 measure of money_
| Having all those extra dollars out there inevitably means that the ones you happen to have will buy less than before.

**Where did all these extra dollars come from?** The government created more currency by having the Federal Reserve purchase Treasury and mortgage-backed securities. It is the 21st century version of running a printing press – and they did it to supposedly grow the economy.

But of course, printing more money does not make more wealth. Quite the opposite, in fact.

Thanks to all the extra dollars, the cost of living for millions of American workers is now rising faster than their salaries. Retirees find that the value of their savings is being eroded. **Progressive politicians are hurting precisely the people they claim to represent!**

The federal authorities like to pretend that this surge in prices is only temporary. They blame supply-side bottle necks caused by Covid. As our own Josiah Dalke points out, [inflation growth isn’t quite so temporary after all.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=712a9dd6ea&e=5703353baa)

**Inflation isn’t caused by temporary supply chain disruption ****–****It’s caused by the fed itself.**

America desperately needs a return to sound monetary management. And we need a conservative movement that understands the importance of sound monetary management.
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| TOP FIVE
---
| | | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0de8cfc0d0&e=5703353baa)
---
1 **Too Many Regulators and Too Many Regulations ****-** Read Josiah Dalke
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a041721003&e=5703353baa)
---

---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=746f7681d0&e=5703353baa)
---
3 **Inflation Turned Out to Be Not So Temporary -** Read Josiah Dalke
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=147be452c2&e=5703353baa)
---

---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=adc53bc5cd&e=5703353baa)
---
5 **_Barriers on Healthcare Providers Hurt Minorities_ -** Read Matthew Nicaud

|

name: Josh Harder
subject: What is Trump’s inner circle trying to hide?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/c2Rx3Xeejm_S6cFTzPzmaCae1jH45WIbfQgxKNS_jIY=/iIxCsnIdSdFXdPblmhjqaS_0jb8MWzcN5A_AwooM6P0=?refcode=E12901-20211211-Meadows-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, Every time a member of Trump's inner circle refuses to cooperate with Congress, it begs the question in my mind: what are they trying to hide? There are now at least 5 people trying to skirt the authority of the January 6th Committee and refusing to sit down and answer questions under oath. First we voted to hold Steven Bannon in criminal contempt of Congress. Now Trump's Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, and a former member of Congress I might add, is following down the exact same path. Meadows should know better than to try and skirt the authority of our Congressional oversight. He knows exactly what he is doing. **I 'll be very clear about this: If Mark Meadows refuses to cooperate with the January 6th committee and they vote to hold him in contempt like they did with Steven Bannon, I will do the same when it reaches the House floor. This is about protecting our democracy and defending the rule of law.** I'm afraid that our House majority is only 3 seats away from turning over to GOP extremists if we don't fight back. Our race will determine that outcome. * He’s lining up right-wing candidates in key Senate races.

We haven’t seen your signature on Martin’s petition yet, so we’re asking you to add your name today: [**Will you call on the U.S. Senate to enshrine reproductive rights into law by passing the _Women’s Health Protection Act_? _\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
From: Martin Heinrich
Date: Sat, Dec 4, 2021
Subject: Roe v. Wade (petition)
Folks, just days ago, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could directly overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and dismantle women’s health care rights.
This is the same Supreme Court that is now stacked with conservative judges that Donald Trump nominated.
**It can seem unthinkable, but it’s real and it’s imminent.** _Roe v. Wade_ is more at risk of being overturned right now than it has been since it was decided nearly 50 years ago.
**This is bad for women and everyone who believes in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose.**
We need to act quickly at the federal level. We need to make sure that the reproductive rights of every woman, no matter what state she lives in, are protected.
[**I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , which would protect women’s reproductive rights no matter what the Court does next. Will you add your name to call on the U.S. Senate to pass this bill? Time is of the essence here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39580390/320470144/1680769979?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211211_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE3MWVhZS1jMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSauj8yEv0Hc8UsTmCrG_JvuJag9toAKwziHBN-3AVo=&emci=b7ed692b-c05a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=eb171eae-c05a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d363916b15d949b1952651a4b9c75134&_e=kd29C7yNcJjCVgZUMvjl3_8H4aBSs3YAZGQqv6giwYPZ1U1odCXaYBx1JtxGaOcbaRePiKlIfGVGCBFnyDJ9LUTSk9277smbkRsKu6-6oF6pmUchAJsJgC2I6CY8_zCjRK2KjM1JFsOuspRnVEAW2kWaVSWx7a5w0Ccjz6wvSfvcBwdLZNzk2hRpEmmS1rAWnY7_9tzbjVgVeWXmPiUyFDoPf5pNZzGqHzZ96HchEzuRFdKR2itsmbdyTsQlSyq_Vlu0ilMsxWttKQtMrKp_a7YG806-QzB0dp0K03XvH1LRzEDAIMIYQtHeAAyxnBpjWMmCx4AD_jMwp6Ek-MOKhQ8FMyLbGVZ9W-7nx5Bb2s_Pe2ReYTLpsQDbeUOjnABU49uxaiWLZDciMUJipATp7mrOLiE7qvLFsMqgZc5fnms1I9m3kjz1Bp0i_EM94imD0mibOQXsev9pRS2VBON2SUXT2npLh-DRSOVAKBsizy2t9AzX_xTOGwLydj0-eQ-h)

Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I have officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d363916b15d949b1952651a4b9c75134&_e=kd29C7yNcJjCVgZUMvjl3_8H4aBSs3YAZGQqv6giwYPZ1U1odCXaYBx1JtxGaOcbaRePiKlIfGVGCBFnyDJ9LUTSk9277smbkRsKu6-6oF6pmUchAJsJgC2I6CY8_zCjRK2KjM1JFsOuspRnVEAW2kWaVSWx7a5w0Ccjz6wvSfvcBwdLZNzk2hRpEmmS1rAWnY7_9tzbjVgVeWXmPiUyFDoPf5pNZzGqHzZ96HchEzuRFdKR2itsmbdyTsQlSyq_Vlu0ilMsxWttKQtMrKp_a7YG806-QzB0dp0K03XvH1LgvdD_W6Cbcf1KnSYonH7mhHZ_cUuRVSAlHK12pOYKaG2Ktin3FFIN8UuaZzCfbTPS7PYA22mKEzcbTJ1yOORnhpeWYxciu0QIvdHelP9I0LjNYJqR_bEmX1U1zRJgf1-9-_55VASl8ZMvs4kUzzZQNyoJK6YkJAFXYPvxB9SQaV3fCdn--I8ZnNnSInztZzl3ij1L2mnZnJh-Ga45ek35)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d363916b15d949b1952651a4b9c75134&_e=kd29C7yNcJjCVgZUMvjl3_8H4aBSs3YAZGQqv6giwYPZ1U1odCXaYBx1JtxGaOcbaRePiKlIfGVGCBFnyDJ9LUTSk9277smbkRsKu6-6oF6pmUchAJsJgC2I6CY8_zCjRK2KjM1JFsOuspRnVEAW2kWaVSWx7a5w0Ccjz6wvSfvcBwdLZNzk2hRpEmmS1rAWnY7_9tzbjVgVeWXmPiUyFDoPf5pNZzGqHzZ96HchEzuRFdKR2itsmbdyTsQlSyq_Vlu0ilMsxWttKQtMrKp_a7YG806-QzB0dp0K03XvH1LENSP6zvz7Wee5RbHJcNZ8WBS89sDuoE-z3xjq9fWFulG6oX1p89GWyDUmt80wGlFzL5qZfusrdZYysz5ggi065FL6-FiEfPsefj79SE7Mo-7Xiu6rkdj4KiedP23KAMkCQgTTORhb7mvKDAZKIp1d_r7sb6YdlCuWu0UpWrR-5CTXtpqa5Ms7nxSqc1TJYGhLB0eNOeflTynwfy_27unm)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d363916b15d949b1952651a4b9c75134&_e=kd29C7yNcJjCVgZUMvjl3_8H4aBSs3YAZGQqv6giwYPZ1U1odCXaYBx1JtxGaOcbaRePiKlIfGVGCBFnyDJ9LUTSk9277smbkRsKu6-6oF6pmUchAJsJgC2I6CY8_zCjRK2KjM1JFsOuspRnVEAW2kWaVSWx7a5w0Ccjz6wvSfvcBwdLZNzk2hRpEmmS1rAWnY7_9tzbjVgVeWXmPiUyFDoPf5pNZzGqHzZ96HchEzuRFdKR2itsmbdyTsQlSyq_Vlu0ilMsxWttKQtMrKp_a7YG806-QzB0dp0K03XvH1LswDdKNpX6t8FeNtmjqrx7NQO_p5ZQ3GnGW_4DcssyApmxe5RrtcnmHxdeVIzFv7vazAUoKWGJWUyZtFwgH0JiU9ErsNLHHQRUK6na-A103DuuDwd74eT4gW5oV7PAqjVEoDU_of-s_QpQCO2Xck20MCE3AEVwJWTrgKgueqnVmr-Q_13SqzoAi28As71-oxMRHMvDpEePTBAvLue6PbuB) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d363916b15d949b1952651a4b9c75134&_e=kd29C7yNcJjCVgZUMvjl3_8H4aBSs3YAZGQqv6giwYPZ1U1odCXaYBx1JtxGaOcbaRePiKlIfGVGCBFnyDJ9LUTSk9277smbkRsKu6-6oF6pmUchAJsJgC2I6CY8_zCjRK2KjM1JFsOuspRnVEAW2kWaVSWx7a5w0Ccjz6wvSfvcBwdLZNzk2hRpEmmS1rAWnY7_9tzbjVgVeWXmPiUyFDoPf5pNZzGqHzZ96HchEzuRFdKR2itsmbdyTsQlSyq_Vlu0ilMsxWttKQtMrKp_a7YG806-QzB0dp0K03XvH1LtI95NY7nm2RbNZYok2JGOTSVerBaBBef5XGg_FeXzRKeJ5ZN8f0x2_YIulMUGJnvZYxZl8RlJ5GRK3AhnuhuucB2qK6nkusnfyrXctB3xNwN0UW7wYM1gdU8czqqE_B_Dqs1rk0M7bLu5n-WVxuoIed-bBldnXKZbg-7vGrlFWRqjqdQAYS_u4zIEtqcVx_Cg6-YsDN5dtMIQz0iJAGHb)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly in his campaign to win re-election in Arizona? Help us get to 50,000 signers before the end of the weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Beating Mark Kelly is their top priority in 2022, and they are organizing everywhere to get it done.
#

More than 35,000 people have added their names as personal endorsers of Mark Kelly’s re-election. We’re hoping to get to 50,000 by the end of the weekend. Can you add your name today?
**[Please add your name to endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211211-1-15&refcode2=1779.6688874.lMkCNn&t=1&akid=1779%2E6688874%2ElMkCNn)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211211-1-15&refcode2=1779.6688874.lMkCNn&t=2&akid=1779%2E6688874%2ElMkCNn)**
Friends —
In this campaign, we are taking on 5 Republican candidates, millions of dollars in outside spending, and President Trump who said: “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
Beating Mark Kelly is their top priority in 2022, and they are organizing everywhere to get it done.
But so are we. And the first step in that process is getting AS MANY PEOPLE AS POSSIBLE to say they stand with Mark Kelly.
So we’re building a list of personal endorsers, and would love to get your name on the list:
[**Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly in his campaign to win re-election in Arizona? Help us get to 50,000 signers before the end of the weekend.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211211-1-15&refcode2=1779.6688874.lMkCNn&t=3&akid=1779%2E6688874%2ElMkCNn)

name: Ken Russell
subject: It's about time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Peter,
We have a serious problem in this country. It’s one we have faced since our nation’s inception, but it must finally be addressed. There are massive inequalities and injustices sown into the fabric of our legal system, our social system, and our economy. Will you contribute to my campaign right now to unseat Marco Rubio and send someone who respects ALL people to Washington? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues]
It’s past time that we mend the divisions caused by systemic racism, sexism, and economic inequality. I understand the severity of these challenges and as your next US Senator, I promise I will not rest until we make progress towards a better, more equal society.
Can you chip in to help me win this election so I can deliver for the American people?? A donation of any size goes a LONG WAY. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues]
I have spent my career working to close some of the gaps. As city commissioner, I passed an ordnance outlawing conversion therapy. I passed resolutions condemning anti-Muslim discrimination. And I supported DACA so that folks brought into this country as small children can remain in the only home they’ve ever known.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues]
In Florida and across the country, women earn less money than men for the same job. Both Republican rhetoric and policy devalues women, denies people of color the right to vote, and causes immigrants to fear for their safety
In the Senate, I will fight for everyone , because everyone deserves an equal playing field. Will you help me get there by making a donation to my campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues&amount=50]
In Solidarity,
--Ken Russell
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-issue?refcode=2112-email-issues]
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Taxation
body:
Democrats want an economic tailspin?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lKNNeRPQXlOBl5Jg08pG8JHeDh9Y0amPCyBHU2b9ONfpAE1VA1XnuI8SVp_CQya8cRP5VrvqZsFD8GBwvTTAZb9OaA_1045aIPRQtuCZ9d6cQ_FcYbfZRy0R26uTdeHONfhS3HDOHxLNIUSRrghidSQBJQhaWJ0b&c=0ruJmpTRAPZ6HGGzrnLnJhuDWAodcbHkfAPVnG_it3INnPsuOSKMUA==&ch=QZMFliUoBRq8Yb_Ypy9_LWx-cPtLcMtU_jwEKlVk7hxpK2z6GabSOQ==)
---
|
---
|
# Taxing more is all Democrats know
---
The lunacy is stunning--Democrats think they can tax and spend their way out of a global crisis.
Under the Biden Administration's Build Back Better plan--you know, the one that Biden said wouldn't cost anything--numerous new taxes are proposed. While the Left claims that the burden of these new taxes will be paid by the wealthiest Americans, we will all feel this impact through higher costs. Besides, do we really trust these corrupt politicians to keep their grubby little hands off our hard-earned money?
For example, Michael Bennet is joining progressive Elizabeth Warren in supporting the Corporate Profits Minimum Tax plan as a part of Build Back Better. It will require larger companies who make more than $1 billion annually to pay at least 15% of their profits in taxes. What do you think happens to the over 200 impacted companies, their employees, and the costs of their goods and services when this happens?
It's almost as if Democrats want to send this country into an economic tailspin.
We're all feeling it at the grocery store and at the gas pump--I feel it sharply too. Inflation will only grow as spending and taxation continues. The Build Back Better plan will only add to our economic misery, now and in our children's future, while failing to address the myriad crises already contrived by bad government policy.
Meanwhile, the Congressional Budget Office estimates this progressive legislation will add $367 billion to the deficit. Under the Dem's watch, our debt keeps growing exponentially.
I believe we should each determine how we want to spend our money, not have additional costs tacked on to our purchases that go to taxes funding social programs and environmental policies that are bad for Colorado and this nation.
I will fight for less spending and lower taxes as your next U.S. Senator. Stand with me by donating today and joining our cause.

subject: do the blue know you have their back?

Despite his constant threats, failed President Biden knows he cannot take away our right to defend ourselves without first intimidating the people to comply. See my thoughts on the hypocrisy of the Left here: That is why we must always defend our 2nd Amendment Rights to bear arms. And that is what I will do against radicals like Biden in Washington D.C. With your generous support, we can make sure communities in Georgia and across the country will preserve their God-given right to defend themselves: | | | | | | It’s time we remind these out-of-touch Liberal elitists that the Right of the people to keep and bear arms SHALL NOT BE INFRINGED. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Ben=20Carson?=
subject: Announcement: Launching my official PAC 🚨
body:
It's time to Think BIG | | |
---
| | [ ](https://thinkbigamericapac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=29ec9c4df15653bef781a2542&id=ad7e4eae31&e=ea6a9e3912)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

I have a special announcement to share with you, and that is the launch of my official PAC for supporting federal candidates – **Think BIG America PAC.**

We are deeply in need of leaders in Washington, D.C. who are willing to reach beyond soundbites, groupthink and gridlock to actually solve real problems.

Under President Trump, we saw how many great things could be accomplished for this country. Then, with a fairly small shuffling of the leadership deck in the White House and Congress, America is headed down a very different path.

And it's not for the better.

In the short number of years I've been involved in politics, I've been blessed with a tremendous base of patriotic and generous supporters in all 50 states.

Now I want to work with everyone who has supported me to help other candidates, specifically those who believe in life, religious liberty, and policies that will expand opportunity for all our citizens.

It is no small task, but we as citizens have the power to steer America back in the right direction. We can choose to run for office as I once did, or we can directly help other good men and women who've chosen to pursue public office.

Through Think BIG America PAC, I am committed to doing just that, and I look forward to having you on my team.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

---

body:
We Need Law and Order

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=bba4ff76298345ea9d506fad135b9f79&_e=XEis47d1V-oilWKHMJjMOjmPFFmTKVa4Kpn9tRj4Pd9hRk-v3NQXa917NGi1pMaayFZsXb72W74-B14_e95o3D8KX1ysrMrNt1f4Fo0hbk5s-PQ3H8jaLsoZnko4aDAofNPp4O2uFVCfxVJs4KbMXwxhn0ZWbVOd5k2yy6nnjFaz9WnWLuj9s8KswbDKE-ZrjDEBAaWhK0LukGrmEezkUHzMVhgGigNYxLUd-YMmd3nTaLB-8w9_-I9WJ7pEbSWL61I1HDLb797_cC-52mKH8TNLzVr0A29wCz3pFbz-IQ3EDovwFtDqfTVPdA-n64dGV6TMsuoqmSOPhKBDaN8WYFeSJTxPeIQ9bmfE1bBE0CQQvRvvzXL4ZpoyEGNrutZDMKOMr9AOi9t3mIHbYK7zZLNiOZZGF-OJVTUOmfaILlBiZyA3Xt_XreMQGkY-qpfMwy35e2nnFTisHkrwhD_MPDww997t7cY5sKaxgEDRQtnnBgaNopuamQiSLVIx8DWV)
---
Friends,

Every family in the Hudson Valley and across the country deserve to feel safe in their own communities. We need to ensure that those who have committed crimes are removed from our streets. Cashless bail, which has been enacted by the Democrats, makes this impossible and has allowed for criminals to be released back into our communities...

This is not the place to test these far-left experiments...cashless bail doesnt work and is destroying our cities and towns. | [**END CASHLESS BAIL**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=bba4ff76298345ea9d506fad135b9f79&_e=XEis47d1V-oilWKHMJjMOjmPFFmTKVa4Kpn9tRj4Pd9hRk-v3NQXa917NGi1pMaayFZsXb72W74-B14_e95o3D8KX1ysrMrNt1f4Fo0hbk5s-PQ3H8jaLsoZnko4aDAofNPp4O2uFVCfxVJs4KbMXwxhn0ZWbVOd5k2yy6nnjFaz9WnWLuj9s8KswbDKE-ZrjDEBAaWhK0LukGrmEezkUHzMVhgGigNYxLUd-YMmd3nTaLB-8w9_-I9WJ7pEbSWL61I1HDLb797_cC-52mKH8TNLzVr0A29wCz3pFbz-IQ22KID4muaWgzI4TSzOZe7pc8MaJ8z3cbFbbLJnT5ttZIV8zmA1xtsOvKLCXSc04j33InDgdD6d0kLPKg8VB3pZHRA1nwGDbafXloDQmGNeBsxibZyz4kzwSM6apAohX2XMd6aSZ2Kdk9nmnSst77KUNFEUAswnKf7G09mt6YhmUVqKEJKZfY6qxXxDwJwRi1ta6U64xnSEkZU28PRI9zHY)

We cannot allow Hudson Valley families to be held hostage by violent crime any longer. Leadership and action are required. We must stand with law enforcement as they work to preserve public safety and bring those responsible to justice and stand with our schools and community-based organizations that support those most directly impacted by this violence.

**These are important steps needed to ensure every Hudson Valley family has the peace of mind knowing that their children are safe.**

body:
I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e26b61398ca4e9bb0e30ad80c98b45c&_e=jLltoHszD2-IasreZYmf-_OxTB98O4fLOkpnd9ZiyIbhrV5PQuDA99n_PI1m3r10rb1883w9dA0_XDh07yOHvIkEZN7-ksApK6JF0NyfXo9JZcVJs6TrJ8YlyIqqXRG3r7zNOqUN5jfnaeIWMOI-2whOwpT-Lo24EhVDkSQA7iWfXTtVAnNszYBQ4cfWrkUmGa-rAOOHSlupDz0pE6vQ1WmKkWFW7Ak8DN5ofIB6ZVX4xoUwL_ISCPPejy3eOaCWMdgtDGS5D_owsA71W_tvHcyP35_j0oOG8Trhm5s_YHHWviljPyhiZAg6q-NY-kBJfIb_GGQJ7il2HqHTGeS5fLCD_pci9DtZ5wcDh0ewy5ArRx1_uHYNcJ0hDcj6LJNsIIVSF6ZHPZYa5gJQCAHNlNNtOUe__tv0agZjEeOmck5DGLGpdN3yVjCDu08yCUpK5Di_6tyhc20ng7oAB5eW-gXJ2zPq1-w6ogm6IVK2SnA%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I have officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e26b61398ca4e9bb0e30ad80c98b45c&_e=jLltoHszD2-IasreZYmf-_OxTB98O4fLOkpnd9ZiyIbhrV5PQuDA99n_PI1m3r10rb1883w9dA0_XDh07yOHvIkEZN7-ksApK6JF0NyfXo9JZcVJs6TrJ8YlyIqqXRG3r7zNOqUN5jfnaeIWMOI-2whOwpT-Lo24EhVDkSQA7iWfXTtVAnNszYBQ4cfWrkUmGa-rAOOHSlupDz0pE6vQ1WmKkWFW7Ak8DN5ofIB6ZVX4xoUwL_ISCPPejy3eOaCWMdgtDGS5D_owsA71W_tvHWivdwgRMrZHWKZaD1JqA48B3RtWrzQGpu0eaOEx_oCpXHZZt0O9UboR_CHUi0vsEIrMQ6J7N8H2ESaPt_IAexkiLnnGaUjISfbES0qm3iFcAwlBGSHEHgBvYzShdVUgbySX94kvefwYrUHusXKJz9Pk_1hgLRh2IM_UWzV56fELWzLPXLEzHwHUhx46QNyEViM38hnmuooypQWmFUVxroU%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e26b61398ca4e9bb0e30ad80c98b45c&_e=jLltoHszD2-IasreZYmf-_OxTB98O4fLOkpnd9ZiyIbhrV5PQuDA99n_PI1m3r10rb1883w9dA0_XDh07yOHvIkEZN7-ksApK6JF0NyfXo9JZcVJs6TrJ8YlyIqqXRG3r7zNOqUN5jfnaeIWMOI-2whOwpT-Lo24EhVDkSQA7iWfXTtVAnNszYBQ4cfWrkUmGa-rAOOHSlupDz0pE6vQ1WmKkWFW7Ak8DN5ofIB6ZVX4xoUwL_ISCPPejy3eOaCWMdgtDGS5D_owsA71W_tvHegPwWMdfGGX4TBL42e7YlZp88wslOQzaYU85yYLHo5ogy_I_WrCknoQg_vkNMF2JDYOtu97oNneiOoXujRqsFOmu3C28ugX5T90EJzSZZMIZakvZSRkMJrJFI6Laxc49ZR06_2uASlY4PnVsy_AZL55WwPlyzwg23l76ENR_b-sESs49wF0ci6BEOp7SKaI-5gRww3VDBp45mXH8ryarfM%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e26b61398ca4e9bb0e30ad80c98b45c&_e=jLltoHszD2-IasreZYmf-_OxTB98O4fLOkpnd9ZiyIbhrV5PQuDA99n_PI1m3r10rb1883w9dA0_XDh07yOHvIkEZN7-ksApK6JF0NyfXo9JZcVJs6TrJ8YlyIqqXRG3r7zNOqUN5jfnaeIWMOI-2whOwpT-Lo24EhVDkSQA7iWfXTtVAnNszYBQ4cfWrkUmGa-rAOOHSlupDz0pE6vQ1WmKkWFW7Ak8DN5ofIB6ZVX4xoUwL_ISCPPejy3eOaCWMdgtDGS5D_owsA71W_tvHQIIbb4V-NNx9A2Zzn9-qMoIFLpm67l3-5n7gfNpFpbmnojuf53BhbuOrOM-WqZWPo2vbBoYMNt5kzrqxgEbILjQRJNuam6D1f2-5MyJDHU8fxM2ZuqywigLT5GQo0220Rv-foxpbolKp12-i7rm-btxIe5M4H_ter4EYS8ZARa9n0xaMtJn6YpmP5fotY9Z4VHPvu6vld-e0mH_UUHn43U%3D) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e26b61398ca4e9bb0e30ad80c98b45c&_e=jLltoHszD2-IasreZYmf-_OxTB98O4fLOkpnd9ZiyIbhrV5PQuDA99n_PI1m3r10rb1883w9dA0_XDh07yOHvIkEZN7-ksApK6JF0NyfXo9JZcVJs6TrJ8YlyIqqXRG3r7zNOqUN5jfnaeIWMOI-2whOwpT-Lo24EhVDkSQA7iWfXTtVAnNszYBQ4cfWrkUmGa-rAOOHSlupDz0pE6vQ1WmKkWFW7Ak8DN5ofIB6ZVX4xoUwL_ISCPPejy3eOaCWMdgtDGS5D_owsA71W_tvHT7P0m7j192rJnFT8muWkDp35Xv1M6b48oZUN9OUr6nnNGD_TruLqkkWmK28VWwPSHY2e4JRf79xfWJF9tGFjHlRWYZeCd2l_YGyW8oyi5AzBMkPfLWM5ut_EyKMavMaM0BGhdul_sROPtUopiWbWAoZ_r7YTvXl7F5DzqNDKBN2ruFfYt95dFoPiUiSEXr5rWxCg6m2hPm7WgmcAQqLREo%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Fellow Conservative, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Robin Logsdon
subject: FWD: Could you live off of a $7.25 minimum wage?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Matt is asking if you saw this? | Hey friend, it's Robin. Matt emailed you a few days ago about our petition to _demand Congress raise the federal minimum wage_. But we’ve only seen 147 signatures come in thus far. Have you had a chance to read it yet? Matt isn’t quitting until working people in Oregon and across the country receive a living wage. But he’s counting on us to join him in this fight. **_[So please, don’t forget to sign the petition to make your voice heard>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581295/320474292/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY5YTFkMi1jODVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaQG_nTVRZyDaCeGSm1-RIEdU6kXZ6mI08AVWQv6_tQ=&emci=8002c317-0359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0869a1d2-c85a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)_** Thanks again, Robin Logsdon
**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Matt West
**Date:** Dec 9, 2021, 12:20 PM
**Subject:** Could you live off of a $7.25 minimum wage?
> **$7.25** Today’s federal minimum wage is $7.25, friend. In some parts of Oregon, it’s only slightly higher at $12.75. But if the minimum wage had kept up with productivity, it would be $24 an hour today. The worst part is Congress hasn’t bothered raising the minimum wage since 2009. Why? Because Republicans love scaring their supporters with misleading data. “Small businesses will be destroyed.” “We’ll see job losses.” “Wages are high enough.” False. False. And false, again. **_[Friend, I don’t know about you, but I am not going to let the GOP fool us into being complacent. Will you sign our petition to demand Congress raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581296/320474293/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY5YTFkMi1jODVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaQG_nTVRZyDaCeGSm1-RIEdU6kXZ6mI08AVWQv6_tQ=&emci=8002c317-0359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0869a1d2-c85a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)_** _**[ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581297/320474294/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY5YTFkMi1jODVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaQG_nTVRZyDaCeGSm1-RIEdU6kXZ6mI08AVWQv6_tQ=&emci=8002c317-0359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0869a1d2-c85a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)**_ It doesn’t take a scientist like myself to understand that raising the federal minimum wage to $15 won’t just raise more than a million Americans out of poverty. It will boost the economy and even reduce employer turnover while helping them save money. Not to mention, raising the minimum wage would benefit 32 million workers, most of them in Black and Brown communities who disproportionately hold low-wage jobs. Congress needs leaders who understand that $7.25 an hour won’t cut it anymore. Costs of living like rent, healthcare, and food are skyrocketing. And families are hurting. With your support, we can make living wages a reality, but until I step foot into Washington next year, we need to make our voices heard loud and clear NOW. **_[Add your name next to mine on our petition demanding Congress get the job done!>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581298/320474295/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY5YTFkMi1jODVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaQG_nTVRZyDaCeGSm1-RIEdU6kXZ6mI08AVWQv6_tQ=&emci=8002c317-0359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0869a1d2-c85a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)_** Thanks for your support, Matt West

In some parts of Oregon, it’s only slightly higher at $12.75. But if the minimum wage had kept up with productivity, it would be $24 an hour today. The worst part is Congress hasn’t bothered raising the minimum wage since 2009. Why? Because Republicans love scaring their supporters with misleading data. “Small businesses will be destroyed.” “We’ll see job losses.” “Wages are high enough.” False. False. And false, again. It doesn’t take a scientist like myself to understand that raising the federal minimum wage to $15 won’t just raise more than a million Americans out of poverty. It will boost the economy and even reduce employer turnover while helping them save money. Not to mention, raising the minimum wage would benefit 32 million workers, most of them in Black and Brown communities who disproportionately hold low-wage jobs. Congress needs leaders who understand that $7.25 an hour won’t cut it anymore. Costs of living like rent, healthcare, and food are skyrocketing. And families are hurting. With your support, we can make living wages a reality, but until I step foot into Washington next year, we need to make our voices heard loud and clear NOW. Thanks for your support, Matt West = = PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress Matt West for Congress PO Box 1926 Beaverton, OR 97075 United States Click here to

| | Team, We’ve had a VERY exciting month so far in the race for the Massachusetts governor’s office! **It started last week with some big news: neither Governor Charlie Baker nor his lieutenant Karyn Polito are running for governor’s office in next year’s elections.** Their departure from the race underscores the opportunity we have to jumpstart the progressive future Massachusetts desperately needs — and we’re building the momentum necessary to get the job done come next fall. We’ve already picked up more key endorsements! Last week, national progressive organizations started jumping in, with People’s Action officially backing our campaign. They believe in our vision of putting everyday people first, and know we have what it takes to deliver for families across the state. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581314/320474367/1699647371?refcode=em_20211211_n_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE5YTUzYy1jOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmMVSJle1HMCP1Y26LalDodgMQRiSEk7mFppOuBm6mc=)
---
On top of that, following Charlie Baker’s announcement, a dozen more Massachusetts elected officials endorsed our campaign — we have support from across the Commonwealth, from local and state officials. I’m honored to have earned their support as we fight hand-in-hand against corporate interests and on behalf of working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581315/320474368/1699647371?refcode=em_20211211_n_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE5YTUzYy1jOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmMVSJle1HMCP1Y26LalDodgMQRiSEk7mFppOuBm6mc=)
---
Finally, I have been out meeting with people all across the state over the last few weeks. I’ve joined with community journalists in Hingham and Taunton, solar leaders at SEBANE’s climate forum, and organizers and grassroots supporters in Springfield, Worcester and Boston.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581316/320474369/1699647371?refcode=em_20211211_n_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE5YTUzYy1jOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmMVSJle1HMCP1Y26LalDodgMQRiSEk7mFppOuBm6mc=)
---
It’s always the highlight of my day to talk with people on the trail. And it’s how we’re building this movement for real progressive change in Massachusetts.
We’re done waiting. We’re heading into 2022 with a very real shot at winning real, substantive change for Massachusetts and the people who need it the most. I know just how far we can take this movement — boldly and unapologetically — but it all starts with us coming together right away. [_**Pitch in $15 to grow this grassroots campaign and join us in this fight for our Commonwealth’s future.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39581317/320474370/1699647371?refcode=em_20211211_n_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE5YTUzYy1jOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmMVSJle1HMCP1Y26LalDodgMQRiSEk7mFppOuBm6mc=)
Team, thank you for building this movement with me.
Saludos,
Sonia

Peter - **If you care about election integrity, then DO NOT delete this email.**

In an effort to tee up another failed run for president, former New Jersey **Gov. Chris Christie recently stated that everyone should move on from the 2020 election, criticizing former President Donald Trump and his supporters for focusing on it.**

Elections have consequences. That is why we must have free, fair, and secure elections. **[I have spent most of the last year not only fighting for election integrity in Missouri, but also across the entire nation and I WON'T stop just because Chris Christie says to.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=906676ee828e436388323c96e20370dd&_e=Hg9wIOrIDWQ5TOHq5jfdiTFQf4krLVO-8rXbd4CWCaQfiltIIr5cnNZfpR7habPkrePjRVYaPurla_a9QC_DzIs4pWthom3pxHKoOiqsO1-ZJiZWncOvIskBrG7f0pZRox4x00TwR4-iZ2Pwi30nv2HQfh-YhoQzYLTAJWNB7xA0ncCEx5ew23bkI6qwqaOVC7PKS3K0oh-HEywXAOJjBZUCiEvg9rbsT2ODCfFRD6nT_jmUGgMOqavB9bkiJ7X5odzyZ_UsS69IO4kDlw-_v_ERZHB_gO1pi_P1529IjPwD7qfrHvQKtSYlfqB3yX4wEKGWWDVm7mPIU1IHo5wcKu0am_ZmO9519vJ2Gj0WwKLdZuo3Cgvai6bdbsPXLLOIVAa-hSosOJdaaY5_qF5CdFmZbrg3qHG0f4ClKIn35FPxIGrUdECIeY-fGB2cMb4K_q7Rky-fNu0HWpCo6zy3S_DB-uJBHc-f4RdEZ3DC448%3D)**

Christie is completely out of touch with voters - _with AMERICANS._ **Without election integrity, history will repeat itself, and we will lose our country as we once knew it.**

I am not afraid to speak out and fight for election integrity - **but by doing so, I am putting a HUGE target on my back.** **[That’s why I need to have your support to continue this fight in the United States Senate. Will you stand with me today by pitching in $10, $15 or even $25 towards my campaign right now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=906676ee828e436388323c96e20370dd&_e=Hg9wIOrIDWQ5TOHq5jfdiTFQf4krLVO-8rXbd4CWCaQfiltIIr5cnNZfpR7habPkrePjRVYaPurla_a9QC_DzIs4pWthom3pxHKoOiqsO1-ZJiZWncOvIskBrG7f0pZRox4x00TwR4-iZ2Pwi30nv2HQfh-YhoQzYLTAJWNB7xA0ncCEx5ew23bkI6qwqaOVC7PKS3K0oh-HEywXAOJjBZUCiEvg9rbsT2ODCfFRD6nT_jmUGgMOqavB9bkiJ7X5vhHTpJykwnFjpvxtWKkj4k5sZtf4G6OtiBi7YFUaH9yzHvYTuWZ3nEsGoePW-UflTQ4jmA5BeifW3kHcYiT3_ICWS0FfPT0qGaZB1uRZiNHfTF2IitSo2U1FzUGuFo2DoJP1Cf-pTujZIj4tMoA7Qk8M_R_YHr5MeEClNnqJcESYjsLPPLGpaHmzEbPe0f6Ofx0TVMfRGhjIMAhX53Pkkb1238O3seU5edUEhJof9cA%3D)**

The 2020 election was one of the most unfair, disgraceful events in U.S. history, and **the Democrats are trying to make sure this becomes the new normal on a nationalized scale.** Millions of ballots were mailed to people who never even asked for them. With no voter ID laws in many places and inadequate signature matching and poll monitoring, it was a free-for-all.

In addition to Christie, the media, and the Democrats, several of my Republican colleagues currently in elected office seem to be unaware, or unwilling to admit, that fair elections are the cornerstone to preserving our nation’s exceptional character. Some of them voted to impeach Trump to undo the 2016 election. **Several have caved to the media mob by claiming to be uninterested in any accurate accounting of what happened in 2020**.

**[As we approach the elections of 2022 and 2024, we must elect leaders who support the America First policies that helped our nation thrive across the board.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=906676ee828e436388323c96e20370dd&_e=Hg9wIOrIDWQ5TOHq5jfdiTFQf4krLVO-8rXbd4CWCaQfiltIIr5cnNZfpR7habPkrePjRVYaPurla_a9QC_DzIs4pWthom3pxHKoOiqsO1-ZJiZWncOvIskBrG7f0pZRox4x00TwR4-iZ2Pwi30nv2HQfh-YhoQzYLTAJWNB7xA0ncCEx5ew23bkI6qwqaOVC7PKS3K0oh-HEywXAOJjBZUCiEvg9rbsT2ODCfFRD6nT_jmUGgMOqavB9bkiJ7X5xtd5T0R1xBDvGTPafFiOnJVe1MPyJ3BUsRnfVE43fkjmvM_k11zwfIFwToKHmG6l-0MrqG1EQIDP9sIXU7cnYiGkVVMVE7ynolp86TUQ0K-LdNp8K1M3o2ODvv1FHnIHC56JcYqpIQT_ypw8_KYOg_uT7ukLE_ekfLG4-tUy7_VmYze1ZAcUO-waJHXsygiR8u3vpo5X_GZTHTjl3prlITmzfA66FywryTg88iN0sCA%3D)** Christie didn’t understand what voters cared about in 2016. That is why his campaign failed and any future campaign WILL FAIL.

Similar to President Trump, **I am not afraid to talk about issues that make coastal elites uncomfortable...**

* **We need secure elections.**
* We need secure borders.
* We need pro-worker trade policies.
* **We need leaders who will put the United States FIRST.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I will always put Missourians and my fellow voters first - and that starts with ensuring their voices are heard at the ballot box. **[I will fight every single day for America First, will you join my team and this fight immediately?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=906676ee828e436388323c96e20370dd&_e=Hg9wIOrIDWQ5TOHq5jfdiTFQf4krLVO-8rXbd4CWCaQfiltIIr5cnNZfpR7habPkrePjRVYaPurla_a9QC_DzIs4pWthom3pxHKoOiqsO1-ZJiZWncOvIskBrG7f0pZRox4x00TwR4-iZ2Pwi30nv2HQfh-YhoQzYLTAJWNB7xA0ncCEx5ew23bkI6qwqaOVC7PKS3K0oh-HEywXAOJjBZUCiEvg9rbsT2ODCfFRD6nT_jmUGgMOqavB9bkiJ7X5EJOfRGPb8y7Le7wPZYnLMQFKgzLTaSLWVjSzlg4WIQYWp6ZqAJc5-0XbfP_-it8YY0hUQoJ_NtRB1ppYfTnIp9LB_NETnWlj4BdYZrFQrzXyDGXH0-yGrdtP-uripgCc0LOkxR8vmmYKHfIIN8hprWBqXKJHI9Z5FrAt6rDokNbJyfi6icIjx-pFiNPs_DRCt4lmWTU_LABE8tA-bNizuSD7zK-swI6_-Wg5Y6WGk3Q%3D)**

[** FIGHT FOR ELECTION SECURITY WITH BILLY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=906676ee828e436388323c96e20370dd&_e=Hg9wIOrIDWQ5TOHq5jfdiTFQf4krLVO-8rXbd4CWCaQfiltIIr5cnNZfpR7habPkrePjRVYaPurla_a9QC_DzIs4pWthom3pxHKoOiqsO1-ZJiZWncOvIskBrG7f0pZRox4x00TwR4-iZ2Pwi30nv2HQfh-YhoQzYLTAJWNB7xA0ncCEx5ew23bkI6qwqaOVC7PKS3K0oh-HEywXAOJjBZUCiEvg9rbsT2ODCfFRD6nT_jmUGgMOqavB9bkiJ7X5Jbr3YRJDfO-dfEPcSk7N3KnwX0r7JPkSvs4-TvPpvWANKN0UKYMHVrg1QNnPjeG2HteJ3eSjXqij1VcCDXvXrPP-IPU_ui9E2CbsfVhvgI8yVqrEKovM7yFZf4prILPpO5fp077XoqPHTVTl9ucrR6Lm6Fr-_ZXGCxlaQSoBXJEqjR6t9yquxv6T2zv2JLakYb39i5h_ScFfr3vcRDJHETVVp02vA3hNcwMRdEbde_o%3D)

Billy Long
