name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8270%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=n9HlXhwDHPB1J1BCkqtB9w&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1CwMDQ6kP47tzR1zwOTSlw&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1CwMDQ6kP47tzR1zwOTSlw&sysid=1) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ --and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021 --but we need your help to do it.**** **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19432%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WA%2bCYbjN9WTg6LEzs7bzLA&sysid=1) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J7RwAyU7ZbIDYwZTvg0Klg&sysid=1)**[?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19434%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CQ56wK2EteXb4YYmc9Yezw&sysid=1) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3WGkrsSSCRznBxZN6CQ%2bQA&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Gift!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=djgnECrou9dI4Kff3zOBZg&sysid=1)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19447%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LQ1LcApHEiZNqdY3vw7Qzg&sysid=1) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen--by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zfJMXwYJbys5m9XIbWGXuw&sysid=1)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19449%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B4%2bvbXUJLLYm9lfTUbhFGQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xzCiu9SSWWsP1wk3HsGK0A&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19441%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PcK%2bO77PU2vNPMo36PZ%2bDw&sysid=1)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on--_and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** --[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hb%2fhcnRwQjDn8h6ws1ZOSw&sysid=1)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8270%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=n9HlXhwDHPB1J1BCkqtB9w&sysid=1)_

name: Brown-Mendes HQ
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

We wanted to take a moment away from #SleepOutRI to ask if [ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]you could
please consider supporting our campaign with a $5 donation. Let us explain
why:

A growing number of people across Rhode Island are wondering how they are
going to get by this season. They’re thinking about how to pay for quality
childcare, how expensive their prescription drugs are, finding jobs that
treat them with respect and pay a living wage, and making sure their
children receive high-quality education.

And all the while, they’re struggling to make ends meet while a pandemic
continues to rage. Democrats in the federal government fought hard to
bring relief to Rhode Island, and when President Biden signed the American
Rescue Plan Act into law, he allocated more than $1.1 billion to help
Rhode Island recover with dignity.

But instead of making sure Rhode Islanders who are struggling to get by
aren’t left behind, Governor McKee didn’t do anything with that money.
He’s let it sit for almost 300 days.

The people of Rhode Island deserve someone who will listen to them,
someone who will show up when it matters most, and someone who will get
the job done. That hasn’t happened with the establishment Democrats in
office. It’s why Matt and Cynthia decided to run for Governor and
Lieutenant Governor, and it’s why we’re personally asking for your help to
build this campaign.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]Can you
power our movement with a $5 contribution, or more if you can afford to,
so that we can get rid of the do-nothing, corrupt leadership and build a
Rhode Island state government that is relentlessly determined to fight for
everyone?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3162?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3163?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]CHIP IN $27 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3164?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3165?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3166?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211211_AM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’re running a campaign that is for the people, and we aren’t taking any
money from corporate PACs, fossil fuel companies, or corporate lobbyists.
So it makes an impact when you contribute to our campaign.

Thank you for being a part of our team — let’s keep fighting together!

In Solidarity,

Team Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=317%2E43343%2ENQSpB9 ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I am proud to call myself a conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9d94350bd16438f9617b810856a28ae&_e=xz0SzBLR7R4K7U2kdvt3Xa9QmDxVuhdkoj-at6rEQPWKybB69hH-83go8Go93q7xoMhuyL6ZTHCu2chbHJYyr9VZRdzIETl2bnaJWRWtQdCRug23PlAKNKdxyFKZ2gN6-huMaMpFDmFL54W-Volv11ycNMD1-wquQAbREZRjo7cxLvTv3FLN6da4ap11NeP_XSq6dOJU08h8rv6HV9VNBbvjxKSrGSxs3A8IL5TYZXYD_MhLwxnIEczXLo8d5oNgQcclJq5RUrSucCg1wqC06vFujz20eEaRmmWAe5T33lWwV3dPAd9fvUsTNQYtZQBp-9wXxBz5r0SrBfxkDnqJK-FUj6hbcQNU2MDCB4y_Ett9HifZmfuyEzxHtH78oaZ5Jok5nG4JT00TjcRJWPlx2nLGgGMOJeJyb_7xJMkr750o1jaatbG94a9xBaqVgYH9a9DjF7Iu_efF6ZAf1n2GZwCetrfo-6M9eOKmWIqSuvc%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I have officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9d94350bd16438f9617b810856a28ae&_e=xz0SzBLR7R4K7U2kdvt3Xa9QmDxVuhdkoj-at6rEQPWKybB69hH-83go8Go93q7xoMhuyL6ZTHCu2chbHJYyr9VZRdzIETl2bnaJWRWtQdCRug23PlAKNKdxyFKZ2gN6-huMaMpFDmFL54W-Volv11ycNMD1-wquQAbREZRjo7cxLvTv3FLN6da4ap11NeP_XSq6dOJU08h8rv6HV9VNBbvjxKSrGSxs3A8IL5TYZXYD_MhLwxnIEczXLo8d5oNgQcclJq5RUrSucCg1wqC06mGp5wwNH487kgRJBjJw5JQkdCqFnR-S1y2qe0_v8VOd0dVV6bZIliTynv2EVNAiYOCRKg1ik-nZZHsIkZ0G5Un7kBuKFuknKxAqLBlyl4rv-lqTXPQ-6Dm2uUD8DlriSxjQEYbIW-SjLaixR1dXHXKhFC-igJ-Lt5pubxggT7LFaBfJuNWT20VU0fE7hEeq_qRe2mCZ6m6BCJgNTsmkS64%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9d94350bd16438f9617b810856a28ae&_e=xz0SzBLR7R4K7U2kdvt3Xa9QmDxVuhdkoj-at6rEQPWKybB69hH-83go8Go93q7xoMhuyL6ZTHCu2chbHJYyr9VZRdzIETl2bnaJWRWtQdCRug23PlAKNKdxyFKZ2gN6-huMaMpFDmFL54W-Volv11ycNMD1-wquQAbREZRjo7cxLvTv3FLN6da4ap11NeP_XSq6dOJU08h8rv6HV9VNBbvjxKSrGSxs3A8IL5TYZXYD_MhLwxnIEczXLo8d5oNgQcclJq5RUrSucCg1wqC06kfAwuzhMqZv1t9P1I8V4MviTaieGHvlrnmJfEh5o2rTMdsBBVcKJmEUtx66O5ye2_05YcfqlPYtGdYqb5--vLx_sqGaVDlhwI_LKkwOLl6S-64QGz5DdbFkeaQydFiDqOF-0RLpOwFwMqNdbLBDn5xpi96_VE49III-hcWw31JNq_QZyXjyyiJ9P9y5Um3KbocMSh7W2wqTd7-lgorVNq4%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9d94350bd16438f9617b810856a28ae&_e=xz0SzBLR7R4K7U2kdvt3Xa9QmDxVuhdkoj-at6rEQPWKybB69hH-83go8Go93q7xoMhuyL6ZTHCu2chbHJYyr9VZRdzIETl2bnaJWRWtQdCRug23PlAKNKdxyFKZ2gN6-huMaMpFDmFL54W-Volv11ycNMD1-wquQAbREZRjo7cxLvTv3FLN6da4ap11NeP_XSq6dOJU08h8rv6HV9VNBbvjxKSrGSxs3A8IL5TYZXYD_MhLwxnIEczXLo8d5oNgQcclJq5RUrSucCg1wqC06qO8zFwScLCHcMTCkao49-575E0x35v8z8nHQNjp1Zk0u1UcR7QcTxMLg6Jspf8CpXLf6DLSd_NhIGx56HEVvKlASqTk1PTYCb6UUpqqNcmQplQzkigVUyNQ81_GxYzKVGwuYY062Rkx7knT-8JG9RlYlboltMz2W_izm0l4xUarpJ4derpNBTzSoE-PMzLcj8NUjRmMaic59McYylebQUA%3D) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9d94350bd16438f9617b810856a28ae&_e=xz0SzBLR7R4K7U2kdvt3Xa9QmDxVuhdkoj-at6rEQPWKybB69hH-83go8Go93q7xoMhuyL6ZTHCu2chbHJYyr9VZRdzIETl2bnaJWRWtQdCRug23PlAKNKdxyFKZ2gN6-huMaMpFDmFL54W-Volv11ycNMD1-wquQAbREZRjo7cxLvTv3FLN6da4ap11NeP_XSq6dOJU08h8rv6HV9VNBbvjxKSrGSxs3A8IL5TYZXYD_MhLwxnIEczXLo8d5oNgQcclJq5RUrSucCg1wqC06kOT4Qw1oRaLq3zCQU_3LBtf1LchkHEthmbrqDFPm7HWwcW4HjAou713jmSIq2NSmB7EpPCivg0PLU5iRWb15EfEj8xy6CKSr966qWQcla90RbVOIB424hCZGGo6pIPyQU7bN1G9DcQcQ_Vc4EAhZP4D6Fwlt4WYsUuBQ-c-KU42rl3_vXxVhIznPFMeT3ftB0YkyMMhrw4wVGhyhjQ7kUQ%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Fellow Conservative, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: Since announcing my campaign for Governor, I've released plans to improve education, build 21st century infrastructure that will create clean energy jobs, solve our housing crisis, and provide relief from the rising cost of living. Peter, Since announcing my campaign for Governor, I've released plans to improve education, build 21st century infrastructure that will create clean energy jobs, solve our housing crisis, and provide relief from the rising cost of living. Now that the new year is around the corner, I want to hear from you to see what plans you would like us to focus on next to build a stronger Rhode Island economy that works for all. I'm ready to work every day to build a bright future where every Rhode Islander has a chance to succeed. But first, I want to know what issues you want me to focus on in the new year. Let's Get to Work! Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

Why is it that when Democrats “compromise” on the Pentagon budget it means billions in extra corporate defense contracts, but a “compromise” on Build Back Better is cutting paid family leave, Medicare expansion, and free community college? **We don’t just need more Democrats in Congress, we need better Democrats in Congress.** **[It’s time to tell establishment Democrats in Congress that it’s not enough to just show up for politics as usual. We expect integrity. Can you donate $7 to help elect better Democrats?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfvZTlCA0YYB4kJpyHbQMKi7pKymk9jrLdX7GFY0NUW1pJKdfM7q5YHauDtQRTFEpABN3t7GbK038IhpXnoiAt0v1P2oaHTLb_41RCFMlpIN14ZR0NFCyz7yKEbk_BlB664QdlfBAopLNhiz81GWp2erz8ASK-tjiIRl_nnQNLrL4fYLpZ5p47JaCYZbkyqnQAMNXPgkioJ2KBV-qo8CzSFv1Mrtzkgmv3rSqMwEjYdv9PuTqqd4KdblDQ_ee-wHrPT5ZMMb6HvZtV2VAuTyG_yTrK9eupf4fkffVxm9XCytoxFUBqVGQq56RQ_rJveScG/3hr/1sVzpP-nSVWPlSqUl8QwVw/h1/Kxmn40GofPy4ecfJ5KXULLnUUkpo8wqYNO0WSMpZ-9M)** [Donate $7](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfo2Fw7R8pQ3LAXVGqiOoG2hmOvrETaz6p6ao6L1RkVH6iLWxfNwhOuRj45_SlMKqEw_ESqxqudcjI2V-PgpBykxySzjZALi0dmO5SPHGnPz3d0qXM-5t9MsOD5DUBwNBGcbUEigvKqFD6AdnIXVBX17aoX0BnT2IC4lVybul3q8ada5PxMjOyjS0dnbSmgn8DpgZVT7izekJq5RmffJ9bkbWr5PuXk4Ebyr7gGg6Ejz4XRKYaU8yb9AxXth6FMCq3HgtvkEFfyGcQTm1L4zTEAO9OSb4zcwOA7OvhtzKkSM9SZrwjDvUVE-dwQjW0IaSv/3hr/1sVzpP-nSVWPlSqUl8QwVw/h2/bYS3p1ZQu6plBOpkA887UZuIm9txtqvdKDd1k3ELRFI) Politicians in Congress seem to have learned nothing from decades of trillion dollar wars and disinvestment in housing, education, and the social safety net. If you read our emails you know that our district is calling out for support. People are getting priced out of their homes, they can’t afford to go to the doctor, our schools are being shut down, and there is an epidemic of gun violence. clean_body: 169 House Democrats voted with Republicans to increase military spending to $768 billion. | | | Dear Team, This week, 169 Democrats voted with Republicans to pass the largest Pentagon budget in American history: $768 billion—more than the Pentagon even requested. Why is it that when Democrats “compromise” on the Pentagon budget it means billions in extra corporate defense contracts, but a “compromise” on Build Back Better is cutting paid family leave, Medicare expansion, and free community college? We don’t just need more Democrats in Congress, we need better Democrats in Congress. Politicians in Congress seem to have learned nothing from decades of trillion dollar wars and disinvestment in housing, education, and the social safety net. If you read our emails you know that our district is calling out for support. People are getting priced out of their homes, they can’t afford to go to the doctor, our schools are being shut down, and there is an epidemic of gun violence. Even with all of this, somehow, 169 democrats decided to vote to raise our defense budget, while Build Back Better sits and waits. There is a better future for IL-7, for our country. clean_body: | | | | | Folks -- I need you to take a look at this: When Steve announced our December mid-month goal, this team rushed to help. But now, donations are stalling and I’m getting worried that we won’t be able to make up the difference before the deadline. It’s essential that we catch up -- | | | | | | | | | | | | | Steve has ****six MAGA opponents running against him, and now Trump says he plans to visit Nevada and build up his operation to flip this Battleground state red. If we can’t keep Nevada blue, we might as well kiss all of Steve’s legislative wins goodbye. That’s why we can’t hold anything back in this critical race . Friend,

**_The holidays are a time of love, companionship, and memories spent with loved ones._**

But because of Biden’s negligence and continued ignorance of the inflation crisis, there will be families who can’t afford to give their loved ones gifts, families who will not be able to keep the lights on, and families who can’t pay the higher gas prices to visit family.
| [**DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY FROM BIDEN!**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=b4b28cc781ca4c85a049c8850e8d6cd6&_e=UJ22EKMjY964MWyI9UNvFNiTcCAKe7x9Mo-TaxLhkYLfF7f_h2hZY4bZYg1UQ5U4MosiaCgaXOB3EUVNWMinT7KhrH4aw6Pc7MVnQTMUsALI5yhDgGXavgIzlVsukFfB3YS0m2nBr9bAgdUL7OjPO1JrmvaDjcPpkxeBX4rAnxNDVp8H1nue8WahINFUl2MNC7jLWacK_IlGb3mZGyoGquBOztkaZXHAnR8Rrv2J-WZFNkOMSr-TRlOpa-SsHbWxtOIpP8wQrL1sTtosgd2nmYFtYsjN8ZesZSgSOvJIlspTyCcQUVgXSL05RAtg720F4dtnjC_l0E1Nkps_0xCIk8sAzzDamuZmFGaMEkw9Ir5JEiv9dDZtlVbcRoKDBDymf4zMUhPwHsb93yTbXlr3K4gpmoO-aF9aqAThAW2naTKE_wNF_Yy5YW1d7Jk3_gIE7SDr8jD5Uy7sFyxvbUjZhvVwajaUgmCJbuT1OQNyIfRR5OC6p5WezVbmXy5sGruHsQmdjOxCjvA6Wh7EDwlQ_A%3D%3D)

It is heartbreaking to see the effects of Biden’s actions and the Democrat Party's corrupt agenda on every single American.

Americans are hurting, and frankly, Democrats don’t care. clean_body: There are so many to choose from Friend, Where do we begin? President Trump accomplished more in 4 years than any other President has done in history, so we had trouble choosing which of his greatest accomplishments we wanted to discuss first. Ultimately, we decided to go with President Trump's original promise, securing our borders and keeping Americans safe. Under President Trump 's leadership: America built over 400 miles of new border wall Illegal border crossings dropped a stunning 87% Mexico agreed to deploy 10,000 of its own troops to secure the border Immigration laws were fully enforced and the highly successful "expedited removal" of illegal aliens was implemented The Justice Department prosecuted a record number of immigration-related crimes And so much more. Promise made. Promise kept. Friend, President Trump is a man of his word and he worked tirelessly for four years to make sure our border was secure so that you and your family were safe from violent illegal aliens. Now, Joe Biden and his incompetent regime have erased all of the security America gained under President Trump and turned our southern border into a revolving door. President Trump needs your help to make sure Republicans take control of Congress in 2022 and implement his America First border policies once again. Will you step up for President Trump and the security of America? - Thank you, Team Trump Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 |

**But now that Evers’ poll numbers are plummeting (_53% of voters say they would _not_ reelect him_), Democrats know their 20,000-vote advantage is all but ERASED.**

_It’s desperation time for the radical Left in Wisconsin. We MUST be ready to fight back against their last-ditch efforts to torpedo our new momentum._

clean_body: First Virginia, then Wisconsin. | Friend, it’s no wonder the Left is laser focused on Wisconsin... Tony Evers’ margin of victory in 2018 was just 29,227 votes. And Joe Biden’s margin in our state last year shrunk to merely 20,682 votes...and that is with Democrats’ suspicious tactics! But now that Evers’ poll numbers are plummeting (53% of voters say they would not reelect him), Democrats know their 20,000-vote advantage is all but ERASED. It’s desperation time for the radical Left in Wisconsin. We MUST be ready to fight back against their last-ditch efforts to torpedo our new momentum. Cook Political Report just shifted this battleground state to a true 50-50 toss-up, and it’s clear why... Both Joe Biden and Tony Evers have hit record-low approval ratings, sending Evers into a panic. His allies even launched a lying attack ad against me to try and stall our momentum right out of the gate. But we can’t become complacent, Friend. If we underestimate just how far Evers is willing to go to keep Wisconsin blue, then he may very well succeed in his attacks. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: BRAND NEW EVENT: America Fest 2021
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z795enm2idqukcsv90ks1j0d6u4v8qa94dll7b68_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp8dbn0imuc49178s4cqm2uag4e020g3av71v8h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zflg6tfnlga79ojurdh423n199vuj5ja3d2urie8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3ke38t2u5pf6l14lt4ebtjbfk86r2jkrour3qh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)**[?](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znscks06ipb88cm53id5mi7s3eko5av10oop6kd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zn5mc8f01f8hu6jmae5mm0rts1nbn1tucnu3hck0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zm6phi28g4u68eshhepdi9ip47u01paujo04u6kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsm5e423v929dmh5njtnkmfrrrr2q156iqc7faj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z25o0qtpgv4pvhbptbbr89s9ga9k5lkps1k33nn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgssapbh2ea9kbqlqfe79qu1cnu5nil897q959ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zeejacp3pffq8apeivac5gdtk66qt9bq1opbecio_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg6egbkjpgf26mklns0em1rbbvkc264hd2kvmikg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqg2uilsq3uqf5h84395jnshc1h8as43cvg7p8io_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s9hm8o74cph2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

| | | Fellow Conservative I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this, so I’ll keep it short.

We are only a few days away from OUR LAST DEADLINE before our End of Year fundraising deadline...and our numbers are not looking good. This is our last deadline before the quarter, month, and year expire and we can't afford to fail.

When I was named one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators up for reelection, I didn’t want to believe it. But now I do. Democrats are just pummeling Florida with their radical cash and we are having a hard time keeping up. I knew my opponent and I were virtually tied, and I knew this was going to be a tough and expensive race, but we are really in the thick of it right now.

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6664%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vQgUap6%2b8VR%2fO033%2flLBWg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68731%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lTQgDnzBArArCdPIYFyJ7w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZrO7KGzf9CHnrI%2fjW7CStg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZrO7KGzf9CHnrI%2fjW7CStg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6664%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vQgUap6%2b8VR%2fO033%2flLBWg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6664%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vQgUap6%2b8VR%2fO033%2flLBWg&sysid=1)

subject: More DeSantis, less Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress

They don’t have a coherent message or vision for how to restore our economy. They have nothing to show for their time in power. Their entire political strategy is to call you racist and attack the former administration. Hello,
The latest school shooting in Oxford, Michigan, is still on my mind.
As a nearly-40-year veteran of the U.S. Navy, I know what weapons of war are capable of. As a parent, I cannot even imagine what the victims’ families are going through.
We have a gun violence epidemic in this country – one that we can reverse if we are willing to actually stand up to the NRA and pass common-sense gun safety laws that are supported by 90% of Americans and even the vast majority of gun owners.
But Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley are standing in the way. Just days after 4 more families were torn apart forever, Grassley stood up and blocked Senator Chris Murphy’s bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases.
**It’s important that I hear from people like you and what you think can and must be done to stop the NRA and create safer communities for our kids and families.[Will you click here now and take a quick survey to share your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39582186/320479548/410697406?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQ2OGYxMy1kNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8yp6nMFn87jRAYhn8pREA0uFxhxuXhCHmevYN4y0TjQ=&emci=ee0a0807-a25a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f0d68f13-d65a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)**
The time for just “thoughts and prayers” has long passed. It is time for action.
Thank you for being part of my campaign,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

Peter, **** On December 6th, over 20 brave young people in Arizona began an indefinite hunger strike for democracy in order to demand passage of the Freedom To Vote Act this year. One of their goals: pressure Senator Kyrsten Sinema to change her position on ending the filibuster, which Republicans have used to block previous versions of this bill. body:
I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=043ca13ad1bb466c847c1c907e9c0da0&_e=DfuW031294GcP8FBUu8hDQI7jw4_YLJVsKcxB1a1mYKc_jJQ3HbtiQws9qPlVpe0ox3dmC85fXpkiQDXVBYx4JNngX7ptCEHQEPZ41qCOK5WsNY-iT2r97eANg9hQdT_LerX6fc-8Jd3BImz6xbBzhwUqgisrQr6Qycj0lA3k6MyZlNHmi5Kf41iKly3H6UIHGKQ59fWpHI-Ji51MeTqVx9B1-uZSJhbH2JSSkBSYm00z1DNX_lEXtHNfWm7fO7c5EDFj_UlAF2DUrFVW0Mf0a5nC7TpGAYU377OghwrBOYoWmKIcbde303Z694_X_o15mLZBSZa__SqsdHbo25Rs_o4x4PQv85fpvoKUzyp597eb-eR1wEOODL_I1TCI9EwZrLSiVQzncmu9my9Dk-11Xw3iQe_0W3gx7PTBzcIqwLIzpKn80E0aJlfH6tKYWh3gclsjEmROUvzJ7ILPW57l5k8tse8RA8k9Wb8ouiEUsc%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I have officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=043ca13ad1bb466c847c1c907e9c0da0&_e=DfuW031294GcP8FBUu8hDQI7jw4_YLJVsKcxB1a1mYKc_jJQ3HbtiQws9qPlVpe0ox3dmC85fXpkiQDXVBYx4JNngX7ptCEHQEPZ41qCOK5WsNY-iT2r97eANg9hQdT_LerX6fc-8Jd3BImz6xbBzhwUqgisrQr6Qycj0lA3k6MyZlNHmi5Kf41iKly3H6UIHGKQ59fWpHI-Ji51MeTqVx9B1-uZSJhbH2JSSkBSYm00z1DNX_lEXtHNfWm7fO7c5EDFj_UlAF2DUrFVW0Mf0bGemFT5ZXfaRn2vGV-EYhpJvKtpg-exS6k5ALBrZIxSfwHoYFFX2_eegr-JBkLK5abY-kns-6v7fkMETSZHH6j9_2SvJCgEMktw7_Z0iTMoXVfFxqXDHFLCxknJnQSGj5PcILbd0JkvoqQJdBmxs8dVxQuy_CTkIhGONSL2DlF4yeStnIUq7TSijAzYn0QSRvDwNhH4BpseTKHjadcsp60%3D)**

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=043ca13ad1bb466c847c1c907e9c0da0&_e=DfuW031294GcP8FBUu8hDQI7jw4_YLJVsKcxB1a1mYKc_jJQ3HbtiQws9qPlVpe0ox3dmC85fXpkiQDXVBYx4JNngX7ptCEHQEPZ41qCOK5WsNY-iT2r97eANg9hQdT_LerX6fc-8Jd3BImz6xbBzhwUqgisrQr6Qycj0lA3k6MyZlNHmi5Kf41iKly3H6UIHGKQ59fWpHI-Ji51MeTqVx9B1-uZSJhbH2JSSkBSYm00z1DNX_lEXtHNfWm7fO7c5EDFj_UlAF2DUrFVW0Mf0ZvQ0UDESqY6TwwTS6P0MZwMuCbd-QyovNwjhU7ZOL4FACM8efjOTtqW_W4QLVldjPttW8b6mJoeO9Oe9gBYXZOQ-cxrZSYpgGg7ePBfr59lV-UtwyqQUd_vCEeTfBPHmIzVmVJCbRYE17U65wJF1-IR_TdGwD4XegDW0xLeBKyZok9SB6xAcznDu9BdHelNlxMQVYmAYXD8jN27-vMlMsM%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=043ca13ad1bb466c847c1c907e9c0da0&_e=DfuW031294GcP8FBUu8hDQI7jw4_YLJVsKcxB1a1mYKc_jJQ3HbtiQws9qPlVpe0ox3dmC85fXpkiQDXVBYx4JNngX7ptCEHQEPZ41qCOK5WsNY-iT2r97eANg9hQdT_LerX6fc-8Jd3BImz6xbBzhwUqgisrQr6Qycj0lA3k6MyZlNHmi5Kf41iKly3H6UIHGKQ59fWpHI-Ji51MeTqVx9B1-uZSJhbH2JSSkBSYm00z1DNX_lEXtHNfWm7fO7c5EDFj_UlAF2DUrFVW0Mf0WOtybYvZZh_IHvBMTmE1PDj8MUZ6uQ-AbeVD8gJJcQB9XHvX809jOsjbbE20YPW5pa5_eDAlMARb1kuyyYYmv7r1xmFOjGvOXnXBFwlmjtERGbSr19EEUfBPz6FNA8j6mjF-T11RnE_W1jMVS8iKsYdMz8F9YZbzUrzyNjOOpE1l2Jc9Q94uee1L4rV0MN_YBIDJnSH10MmN-5pg1o_fN8%3D) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=043ca13ad1bb466c847c1c907e9c0da0&_e=DfuW031294GcP8FBUu8hDQI7jw4_YLJVsKcxB1a1mYKc_jJQ3HbtiQws9qPlVpe0ox3dmC85fXpkiQDXVBYx4JNngX7ptCEHQEPZ41qCOK5WsNY-iT2r97eANg9hQdT_LerX6fc-8Jd3BImz6xbBzhwUqgisrQr6Qycj0lA3k6MyZlNHmi5Kf41iKly3H6UIHGKQ59fWpHI-Ji51MeTqVx9B1-uZSJhbH2JSSkBSYm00z1DNX_lEXtHNfWm7fO7c5EDFj_UlAF2DUrFVW0Mf0UiolfBHuT39-DFBA0HZPdLe110_2FZzxRXM-OMjvuDgF4FM5yRpRFfPbHX_QIwJ-BSApLEivlPJ58vFfkHw6BJlYS9YzL721lNd6rJrWZES_-HwSXBjF_wuSTYLg_mZfZEQGr8RZxrr4tS7RoRF6qJj5ZkPIBoWHfXN8QsgIUnpXJGbn3Jz-mUDWjj9C-7zy-PrZJWCkLcvxFuxjik3r-I%3D)

clean_body: I’ve launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Fellow Conservative, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Hi Peter, it's Abby. Do you have a minute? I'm emailing you to talk about why my race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is so critical. You see, if we flip Iowa blue, Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain Senate control – and right now, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **He's facing his highest disapproval ratings in nearly two decades.**
**[The Senate is split 50-50, so winning in Iowa could be the one race that keeps the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands. That's why I'm reaching out to you ahead of my midnight deadline. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39582504/320480822/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk445-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTVjYmI3ZC1kNzVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_lyLh9Kjuc7LhBEMdHF56hjATgdkJi_aZxvw1XvwCk=)**
Sen. Grassley hasn't seen warning signs like this before, and the GOP knows it too. That's why the Senate Republican campaign arm has already attacked me, and it's why Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley. I'm more than ready to take on Grassley, McConnell, Trump and the rest of the GOP establishment – _bullies don't scare me. _

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans ready for new leadership and Sen. Grassley facing his highest disapproval ratings, we have an unprecedented opportunity in Iowa. We cannot let it pass us by. name: John Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The stakes couldn’t be higher.
#
Derek, please check this out:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&t=1&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)
**John is only leading Republican Dr. Oz by TWO POINTS in the latest poll. Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat — and our Democratic majority — are under threat.**
**[Please rush a donation right now to help us protect John’s lead in Pennsylvania. We need a major push right now from grassroots supporters like you to fight back against Dr. Oz’ millions in TV ads »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&t=2&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
**[FIGHT BACK: DONATE NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&amounts=5&t=3&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
Thank you for rising to the moment,
Team Fetterman
_\---Forwarded message---
__From: JohnFetterman.com
_ _Date: Thurs, Dec. 9, 2021
_ _Subject: BREAKING new poll with Dr. Oz
_ _To: dpwillis67@gmail.com_
Derek, a brand-new poll just dropped — and it shows John Fetterman up 2 points against Republican candidate Dr. Oz in the race for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=ema20211211-3796&t=4&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)
**Here’s what the poll means:** Among likely Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is ahead of Dr. Oz, meaning we’re leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022. _But with only a two-point difference, Dr. Oz’s self-funded campaign has the resources to pull ahead._
**[We need all hands on deck if we’re going to hold — and increase — our lead over Dr. Oz and the other candidates in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat of 2022. Can you make a donation of $5 or more right now to help fund our momentum so we can beat Dr. Oz?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&amounts=5&t=5&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**_How much we can raise while it's still early will play a massive role in building a campaign that can go the distance in the general election._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
**Here's what we know:** John Fetterman is the *only* Democrat in this race who has run and won statewide in Pennsylvania before. And with a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, we can't risk the possibility of Republicans + Mitch McConnell regaining power.
**But here's what else:** As soon as Republicans, including Dr. Oz, see these poll numbers with John in the lead, they're going to flood this race with even more cash. We know this from the last time this seat was up in 2016, when it became the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to fight back against the attacks that are sure to come our way from our GOP opponents? As Republican super PACs and GOP mega-donors prepare to spend millions to try to buy this Senate seat, John is counting on you to step up in a big way by making your first-ever donation to our campaign right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&t=25&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
The great news about this latest poll is that John is in the lead. But that doesn’t mean we can relax. We have to look ahead and build the kind of campaign that can go toe-to-toe against the GOP in the general election — _and win._
**We know Republicans are going to pour corporate and super PAC money into this race as soon as they see John leading the field — heck, Dr. Oz has already funneled nearly $2 MILLION of his own money into TV ad buys — but we can fend off their attacks if we raise enough from grassroots donors _now._**
John doesn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money. **[But that means we're relying on grassroots donors like you from Cresco. Your donation will be immediately put to work building a campaign that can win not just the primary, but the general election, too.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&t=26&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&amounts=5&t=45&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
Thank you, 🙏
Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Not only is John in the lead in this primary, but he's also our *single best shot* at defeating the GOP front-runners in this race and successfully flipping this seat. **We know we're going to face a flood of attacks from Dr. Oz and other Republicans as soon as they see John’s in the lead,[so please donate $5 or more if you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38224?refcode=em20211211-3796&amounts=5&t=46&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211211-3796-footer&t=47&refcode2=3796_434096_5LfbeA&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=48&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=49&akid=3796%2E434096%2E5LfbeA)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: SHOCKING UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Mark Meadows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?
| | **BREAKING: Former Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows will stop cooperating with Jan. 6 panel**

| | ****We 're LIVID.

Trump's right-wing cronies are BLOCKING critical investigations into Jan. 6.

They'll do anything to protect Trump and his crimes.

So at this critical moment, we need to know this grassroots team will continue to hold insurrectionists accountable.**

So tell us: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

We're OUTRAGED.

While investigations into Jan. 6, one of the darkest days in America's history, are under way, Trump's right-wing cronies are BLOCKING every attempt to hold insurrectionists accountable.

They've tried to **STOP** a bipartisan investigation.

They've **DISMISSED** the seriousness of that day.

**And now, top Trump cronies --_like Trump 's former chief of staff Mark Meadows_ \-- are using every trick in the book to stop the truth from being uncovered. **

It's disgusting, but we're not surprised.

Republicans have made it perfectly clear that they have no regard for the truth, integrity, _or our democracy. _

So at this critical moment, we're reaching out to make sure this grassroots team stands firm in their conviction to hold insurrectionists accountable.
**So please tell us: do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to OBSTRUCT the truth?**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
**
**
Thank you,

DCCC
---

Peter — I have an announcement to share. **Today, Roy was officially elected to be the Chair of the Democratic Governors Association!** America’s Democratic governors represent 23 states, Puerto Rico, Guam, the U.S. Virgin Islands, and Washington, DC. Together, they’re fighting to support workers and families, protect voting rights, defend our environment, and secure a brighter future for Americans from coast to coast. Roy and his colleagues know that electing more Democratic governors is critical to delivering on our priorities and protecting the rights we hold dear. Roy’s proven that the right Democratic candidate can win _anywhere_ — **that’s why his colleagues are trusting Roy to lead the DGA through next year’s critical midterm elections.** Those of us at Team Cooper want to send Roy a card saying congratulations. It would mean so much to Roy if you’d sign our card, too. **[Will you say congrats to Roy today? We want to send him the card by Monday!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39582730/320482663/452845452?refcode=ea.c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg2MDM3YS1kZTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdAIyezrHTsn0k3dTuihw7vHf8OlQjDw6S4yUu_GdCc=&emci=3049c2f9-c959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39582731/320482669/452845452?refcode=ea.c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg2MDM3YS1kZTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdAIyezrHTsn0k3dTuihw7vHf8OlQjDw6S4yUu_GdCc=&emci=3049c2f9-c959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c386037a-de5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)**

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Our district is a battleground for control of the U.S. House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

There’s been a lot happening in North Carolina. So, we wanted to take a moment to explain:

Republican state legislators drew extremely gerrymandered Congressional
districts, robbing thousands of North Carolinians — particularly Black and
brown voters — of representation for their political advantage.

These rigged maps turned our district from a safe Democratic district into
a swing district and a battleground for control of the U.S. House. Erica
won’t let Republicans steal this seat — that’s why she’s running to
represent NC-02 in Congress.

This week, the North Carolina Supreme Court took action, halting candidate
filing and pushing back our primary election until May while the courts
rule on the constitutionality of these unfair districts.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29892?refcode=em20211211-677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=677%2E3698%2EJ_ZGmn ]We have to be prepared for any outcome. Will you chip in
$5 to help us build a grassroots campaign powerful enough to
overcome the GOP’s gerrymandering and send Erica to Congress to deliver
real change for working people?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29892?refcode=em20211211-677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=677%2E3698%2EJ_ZGmn ]Donate $5

Betting on Erica is betting on a winning candidate — and that’s absolutely
critical. We can’t afford to take chances in 2022. Erica has run in a
gerrymandered district before and won. As a state senator, she’s
represented over half of the counties in NC-02, and she’s never lost an
election here.

We must not let Republicans get away with their attempts at rigging the
2022 election — and that means putting up a strong Democratic candidate
who can win against dirty Republican attacks and strategies.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29892?refcode=em20211211-677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=677%2E3698%2EJ_ZGmn ]Your donation of $5 to our campaign today will give our
scrappy, grassroots campaign the resources we need to fight back against
disenfranchisement and protect our Democratic majority in the House. Can
we count on your support today?

Thank you,

Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211211-677-footer&t=1022&refcode2=677_3698_J_ZGmn&akid=677%2E3698%2EJ_ZGmn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=677%2E3698%2EJ_ZGmn

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

**You have a track record of leaving California's 22nd district in the dust:**

❌ You took millions of dollars of dark money from corporate donors.
❌ You shamelessly turned your back on our democracy.
❌ _And now, you’re running home to Trump!_

I’ve had enough of your antics, and I agree with Phil — **_good riddance!_**

www.philarballo.com

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. So we’re sending Nunes a personalized letter to let him know how we feel about his EMBARRASSING exit from Congress. = | = TO: Devin Nunes (Trump’s #1 crony) FROM: Peter Willis DATE: December 11th, 2021 Dear Devin Nunes, When I saw you quit Congress to lead Trump’s brand‐new shady media organization, I can’t say I was surprised. You have a track record of leaving California's 22nd district in the dust: ❌ You took millions of dollars of dark money from corporate donors. ❌ You shamelessly turned your back on our democracy. ❌ And now, you’re running home to Trump! I’ve had enough of your antics, and I agree with Phil — good riddance! = | = Your lack of commitment to your constituents will NOT be missed, Devin. And I’m not going to sit back and let another MAGA clone take your place. I’m ready to elect people-first Democrat Phil Arballo to replace you in Congress, and I know the hard work starts now. = = Goodbye, Devin – I sincerely wish you the worst! x.Peter Willis ** 2,000 DEMOCRAT SIGNATURES NEEDED BY 10AM TOMORROW = | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. body:
&n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?31yd0--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hey,
If you don’t know me, my name is Steve Scalise – I’m the Republican Whip in the House. That means it's my job to help lead our group of dedicated Conservatives to hold Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi accountable and defend President Trump's incredible legacy.
[**I’m hoping I could get your help with something.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31yd0-1owfg-4qqlpo8/)
I just got word that Pelosi, The Squad, and all their radical Democrats are plotting a NATIONWIDE blitz and holding 1,000 events to reach as many voters as they possibly can. In America’s closest battleground races, Democrats are storming in to spread their propaganda. **I’m DEEPLY worried.**
_I’m watching these close races like a hawk because even a few votes can change everything. One race was decided by just SIX VOTES._
Pelosi’s Democrats could reach thousands – even millions – of voters, and this is just phase one. [**I’m asking you for just 10 dollars. I need your help to get the word out, set the record straight, and fight back against the Liberal propaganda.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31yd0-1owfh-4qqlpo9/)
If we don’t spring into action now, we’ll be forced to play defense all next year!
**I’m afraid I have to ask for 100% participation.**
That’s what it will take to deploy enough resources to the closest battleground districts. I know you receive lots of emails but I must insist that you respond to this important – and urgent – request.
[**Can you spare just 10 dollars? I’m hoping I can count on you.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31yd0-1owfi-4qqlpo0/)
For America,
Republican Whip Steve Scalise
[****](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31yd0-1owfj-4qqlpo1/)

I wanted to make sure you saw my message urging Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act. Montanans are struggling due to recent waves of Covid-19, wildfires, and record-high Fall temperatures. The volatility is affecting our homes, our jobs, and our economy. This instability is getting worse — that’s why we need the Build Back Better Act now.

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Critical update on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Here’s what the Supreme Court’s latest decision means.
#
Peter,
Yesterday’s Supreme Court ruling means that the heinous Texas abortion ban, which has been in place for more than 100 days now, will continue to block Texans’ ability to exercise their right to an abortion and make their own decisions. It will continue to force patients to remain pregnant when they don’t want to be, doesn’t allow people to get the abortions they need, and means some patients have to travel out of state to seek essential care.
**This ruling is one of many reasons why it’s so urgent we pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, codify Roe v. Wade into law, and protect abortion rights nationwide.**
**[Right now, one the best ways you can get involved in this fight is by donating $5 to keep the Senate blue and expand our majority. We _absolutely can’t_ let the anti-abortion GOP take the majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39583197/320503180/-1296030869?refcode=pm_em_211211_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RiY2RkNi1lNzVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPCH3prNXB7PgHw2bndE7GYK8A7ih5IXuVhcy1b4XBk=)**
Peter, you know you’ve always been able to count on me to defend reproductive rights. And right now in the Senate, it’s an uphill battle to get the Women’s Health Protection Act across the finish line. This is why we need to be focused on reelecting Democrats who will stand strong for reproductive rights and expanding our majority in the Senate in 2022. With reproductive rights at risk like never before, we absolutely can’t give Mitch McConnell and the GOP back control of the chamber.
**[Pitch in $5 or anything you can to support my campaign and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39583198/320503186/-1296030869?refcode=pm_em_211211_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RiY2RkNi1lNzVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPCH3prNXB7PgHw2bndE7GYK8A7ih5IXuVhcy1b4XBk=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Beto for Texas
subject: SB 8 in the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
At this defining moment, Texans need a governor who will defend the right of every Texan to make their own decisions about their own bodies.
#
Yesterday, the Supreme Court failed to put an end to Texas' SB 8 — one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country that places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who supports someone trying to exercise their basic right to control their own health and decide their own future.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50452?refcode=ema20211211-166504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=166504%2E444211%2EXYvgMC)
While abortion providers will be able to challenge this law, Texans will continue to be put in danger every single day that SB 8 stays in effect. **Let's be clear: This is part of a years-long campaign to radically control women's health care across the country that Governor Greg Abbott has proudly helped lead.**
The closure of reproductive health care clinics across Texas in recent years has meant it is more difficult to have a safe abortion, but it also means it is more difficult to receive a cervical cancer screening, tougher to obtain birth control, and harder for people to get basic information on reproductive health care. **The disappearance of reproductive rights for Texans threatens the autonomy, health, and lives of millions of people.**
[At this defining moment, Texans need a governor who will defend the right of every Texan to make their own decisions about their own bodies. Please, every donation brings us one step closer to electing Beto and repealing this anti-choice, anti-women's health care law.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50452?refcode=ema20211211-166504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=166504%2E444211%2EXYvgMC)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50452?refcode=ema20211211-166504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=166504%2E444211%2EXYvgMC)**
**As Governor, Beto will get to work right away to ensure everyone has the right to make their own health care decisions.** Texas already leads the country and much of the developed world in our abysmal maternal mortality rate, and this law is only making it harder for women to receive the care they need.
This is not our vision for Texas, and elected officials like Greg Abbott are only putting more people in danger. We must take action to put an end to this chaos and cruelty.
**We won't back down when it comes to fighting back against anti-choice efforts to roll back reproductive health care — the stakes are too high.** [Consider a $3 or more donation today to make it clear that we need a governor who will protect reproductive rights no matter what.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50452?refcode=ema20211211-166504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=166504%2E444211%2EXYvgMC)
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211211-166504-footer&t=23&refcode2=166504_444211_XYvgMC&akid=166504%2E444211%2EXYvgMC)**

| | | This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

**They’ve been exposed.**

As of December 11th, 2021, over 13 government agencies have **full access** to your entire credit card purchase history.

**Here’s why this is very bad for you,**

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

* Investigate you for “extremist activity”
* Freeze your assets
* Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know **3 simple steps** to ** _become invisible_** to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the [new and FREE book _“Avoiding the Eye”_ by Richard Marshall.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/42/56327/ba4a8b22a29c3f40847f69f594172cb35ba1f2c2/0ad1eca4f182d5df8fb727cca9fb79fbb21a7ed5)

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

* Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... ** _and how to shut it up._**

* How [common appliances spy on you](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/42/56327/ba4a8b22a29c3f40847f69f594172cb35ba1f2c2/0ad1eca4f182d5df8fb727cca9fb79fbb21a7ed5) \- and how to blindfold them for good.

* Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA **openly admitted before Congress** all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of _“Avoiding the Eye”_ , Richard Marshall, [wants you to have his new book for Free](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/42/56327/ba4a8b22a29c3f40847f69f594172cb35ba1f2c2/0ad1eca4f182d5df8fb727cca9fb79fbb21a7ed5)!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - **and a ton have already been claimed.**

To keep the government’s nose out of your business [click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/42/56327/ba4a8b22a29c3f40847f69f594172cb35ba1f2c2/0ad1eca4f182d5df8fb727cca9fb79fbb21a7ed5)

**Thank You.**

body:
| | | **[SIGN ON: Help save the USPS! Tell Congress to fund postal banking.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS-kfXy_8x05yohYuhrlYeNR_p0N3jGj4NcWBp5NoZzHOqrpAyaX0oyzOUNzAOh2121uy_jgi2dnefowDD3LZJuMpy2yAXo51CC3984KgIBWqxsBgRQwfqlqgTD5JS8YXoVMa9_xkiQ65jIVdEfhMdPdxigaxPNze4vA2H00LiV0sPEUgJGgXJnYtTZBsReECR9m_rS0Cm31ahaQ2esnbIdlTAU0R3NiZh3CjFBwbVv7txiNzwu2rrwLKO6Jv_pN36ipLdOQ_nvtLgJf9SsfziODx31sfIQNz2wDHUDMOCUWwBluDE5-MNXeF-thIhXn2akgRJOhyUwY9Rjo6YQ-LMov-QpcZMGhkIRJFcnpZj2TOO_pZLvf0PIrR7CrAJFTk9ztyem97OOM6MxspRJeHpJgApmIl4snkzbZgtdpNWpJUJu1CLzsLYzvjwfV9ML7fA68CMcgVbyt6xTBAZVrjr42cmXLHQIyPncMsLIiDznAIfHd0H3nV61yyClZ7h4fBV9Nbomu5dUTOUZH1htWoFzWZXEsDISMLwowO1cZBofi4/3hr/3sWa_wQkQWS7PAD4q_d0mw/h0/vgzs9p6eQlTJPSAptRZDa2X8bi3cox4yZey4TGaYT0Q) **
Millions of Americans live in “banking deserts”, rural towns or low-income areas without banks nearby. What every town _does_ have, is a local post office, where we can offer basic banking services such as check cashing, bill payment, wire transfers and low fee ATMs.
**Right now, Congress is considering funding pilot programs for postal banking, which will also provide new revenue for our ailing Postal Service. But Wall Street lobbyists are hoping to shut it down.**
**[Tell Congress: Fund postal banking pilot programs in the 2022 budget appropriations bill!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS-kfXy_8x05yohYuhrlYeNR_p0N3jGj4NcWBp5NoZzHOqrpAyaX0oyzOUNzAOh2121uy_jgi2dnefowDD3LZJuMpy2yAXo51CC3984KgIBWqxsBgRQwfqlqgTD5JS8YXoVMa9_xkiQ65jIVdEfhMdPdxigaxPNze4vA2H00LiV0sPEUgJGgXJnYtTZBsReECR9m_rS0Cm31ahaQ2esnbIdlTAU0R3NiZh3CjFBwbVv7txiNzwu2rrwLKO6Jv_pN36ipLdOQ_nvtLgJf9SsfziODx31sfIQNz2wDHUDMOCUWwBluDE5-MNXeF-thIhXn2akgRJOhyUwY9Rjo6YQ-LMomSSw2Mr8DsV09v2twJn509ijoxMRAnHRgaeaFeB9sqxVd0tHZmmEtFeO63K4bl-kwY9EMDqoUuqsAk8mkZrODyu9sNrkkxGKyS_HYCLJzDrVjlJQd-IreQsX7QfgRno0jnEbSO_mkyUUMAW0TktYOns_LqMn_HjKNInpgF0cIvc1SpMGtQKsPWCsfUUm1-hChwu_nmaEdlKi-iFWBFdD-M/3hr/3sWa_wQkQWS7PAD4q_d0mw/h1/Y_El-FlL4QDAgCd1wjTDj4kJ_6UYJ2SwSS-KsZuGDnw)**
Big banks all too often take advantage of low-income people and people of color who are struggling to pay their bills by driving up overdraft fees.
About half of African American and Latino households are underbanked. And while more and more banks are closing their doors, people are being forced to use predatory services like check cashers.
**_No one_ should be punished for a lack of wealth. **
Dozens of other nations like France, Japan, and Germany offer postal banking. We can too!
**[Join Melanie in telling Congress to fund postal banking pilot programs in the 2022 budget appropriations bill now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS-kfXy_8x05yohYuhrlYeNR_p0N3jGj4NcWBp5NoZzHOqrpAyaX0oyzOUNzAOh2121uy_jgi2dnefowDD3LZJuMpy2yAXo51CC3984KgIBWqxsBgRQwfqlqgTD5JS8YXoVMa9_xkiQ65jIVdEfhMdPdxigaxPNze4vA2H00LiV0sPEUgJGgXJnYtTZBsReECR9m_rS0Cm31ahaQ2esnbIdlTAU0R3NiZh3CjFBwbVv7txiNzwu2rrwLKO6Jv_pN36ipLdOQ_nvtLgJf9SsfziODx31sfIQNz2wDHUDMOCUWwBluDE5-MNXeF-thIhXn2akgRJOhyUwY9Rjo6YQ-LMooVMCRnAw5_mS4ySUN2d6XyHRGFfMa4Udu54muwjZWtKutx8IjMean5Z8egpj-XifyleegrHFImiQXIhBA34sTmFqqAob2_tvQ6ZUmY7-PTgPueeeVh1iimjOI0xPnWzkopYGbU7lOYqP05tXjAgmUeZWO0zOjL1SzCqntH5aQ9xN0WkOsoY5HqHbu6Rv6R2VFAg05u1disXMDAzRGdWGOI/3hr/3sWa_wQkQWS7PAD4q_d0mw/h2/QpyAFUbnk-9sYDbEJV86xj_dfnvbH-H6io_Ioifk4sI)**
Thanks for taking action to save the USPS today.
\-- D’Arrigo for Congress

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=65211bc1ecb5412099da217b387e7f20&_e=gTCgPbkHvS8sXZKlzcAHQrIAzGQb04to-A9IGSyCtQt2AZU9srB01yXSy4CloRJ2jmLKPdc6FWL9PPAOJFyffTbq_IciDpxX0NUOrttwaPWbfUp8pxh2URMdyYBys168pmHPBxtXJ455F8a-yURZIOTjlCUzeHUgdo44_jdnRTf6ov_YoGMiLinn0xEsZukGuATm-6K2QkQ9eQaIowiS-ao5AF4OzAnrYPzH91l0G7JM7Fvh27cUTlku15CyzBAhrIrTbWKRYeYoAPUZ6Qg7PaR1-ICoNCVgtRmn5VTgM0IMYf_hYseaM8moPO1Shb_-5bPqgtlyVyuKVCSosJDpIApRPR59ezE6t_ih0R0gfo1Os76ppRQ5hB0Cvq1pnH3IhePARnUPo1bvOc2zaDWVL9X0QnEN0CpSu73DR3sYGSMIvXdGECJ-rDZt8096KXr2C8OBPAFtcXZ8LykRPd488YKi65J4_oWtZOYokxWaU08%3D) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *

Friends,

I am sure you have seen the insane spikes in crime within the past year. One of the most important issues to me is keeping our communities safe.

The Socialist Left in this country wants to defund the police and get rid of law enforcement. Do they see the destructive impact this will have?

You bet they do! That’s why they **_spend thousands on their own private security._** **_Do you support law enforcement?_** | [**YES**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=65211bc1ecb5412099da217b387e7f20&_e=gTCgPbkHvS8sXZKlzcAHQrIAzGQb04to-A9IGSyCtQt2AZU9srB01yXSy4CloRJ2jmLKPdc6FWL9PPAOJFyffTbq_IciDpxX0NUOrttwaPWbfUp8pxh2URMdyYBys168pmHPBxtXJ455F8a-yURZIOTjlCUzeHUgdo44_jdnRTf6ov_YoGMiLinn0xEsZukGuATm-6K2QkQ9eQaIowiS-ao5AF4OzAnrYPzH91l0G7JM7Fvh27cUTlku15CyzBAhrIrTbWKRYeYoAPUZ6Qg7PXgoGc11l7vqdkJvw9pQGZdpPSr-ebHViYYDRaPDhBthYgwgma04aEGOS9hEx-cSrPqgJ7YQfyPPWTpifK9hgVrMLBxvfd5-qnIBJnCT6LsjnZ_68W5iVGN3M5-OPzpDf5gdVfeh89Yqc21ZGpfKV_F5Pr201L8zRzQfpbHEBQ5275-5wa0PJF1GvyKeOMd7iXjPfz_baFodF7rgUWDQIdM%3D)

**_Do you believe that police contribute to safer communities?_** [**ABSOLUTELY**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=65211bc1ecb5412099da217b387e7f20&_e=gTCgPbkHvS8sXZKlzcAHQrIAzGQb04to-A9IGSyCtQt2AZU9srB01yXSy4CloRJ2jmLKPdc6FWL9PPAOJFyffTbq_IciDpxX0NUOrttwaPWbfUp8pxh2URMdyYBys168pmHPBxtXJ455F8a-yURZIOTjlCUzeHUgdo44_jdnRTf6ov_YoGMiLinn0xEsZukGuATm-6K2QkQ9eQaIowiS-ao5AF4OzAnrYPzH91l0G7JM7Fvh27cUTlku15CyzBAhrIrTbWKRYeYoAPUZ6Qg7PWR-RQPHdmOnBJ6qnIYyqrir87-rARxE3U_IPXyY0VDw8emTW95at9VbBkBjnt7G_orCBxXIc0bOnsbqBx-PtXGM8oratAJvlbZsL4ODEJNY2cF_Iao-UlubO_hQPtY9v6Lvo8TsOtm_swsu4neKKAL5Nbn8l6pVUa-UHAN-7IwyWqvTGe_-m4XZGCDuP31tUG0zIHnvLlVfbF1pyZFUIwU%3D)

[**I SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=65211bc1ecb5412099da217b387e7f20&_e=gTCgPbkHvS8sXZKlzcAHQrIAzGQb04to-A9IGSyCtQt2AZU9srB01yXSy4CloRJ2jmLKPdc6FWL9PPAOJFyffTbq_IciDpxX0NUOrttwaPWbfUp8pxh2URMdyYBys168pmHPBxtXJ455F8a-yURZIOTjlCUzeHUgdo44_jdnRTf6ov_YoGMiLinn0xEsZukGuATm-6K2QkQ9eQaIowiS-ao5AF4OzAnrYPzH91l0G7JM7Fvh27cUTlku15CyzBAhrIrTbWKRYeYoAPUZ6Qg7PQTdWZzjSQAvYg5C39Tarl-rWqgpj4RoMy1g_IVFbb4YWv4FQDRdL7zXq37wAdCYteKOAZOS2IL0T1cQSTEAazohFd6huP0UMVNA5EO75GPw2BXzO0V36tRQXcshlW5zBqne2d5Z6T4gfhAInYs7mtKCEjC5FSeLkDRpuUCsGovxTUlztAN1aA6Addfxd51IQ7-g7jMi1lPI4rtNeLtlpiE%3D)
