name: Ruth Gao
subject: Help Those Affected by Storms
body:
Ways to help those in need because of recent storms | _You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to [unsubscribe.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk7ZdSh6orelFHVYOgakF1Tc9w1V-sz7FiGW0r77bIcnnhA4JhvMzOyCQn5xaW1SVVbCDyEfjjb0WSswLM4GDt3lzH1s18TAyR2DJea4eL0rtTPFR6Kv0NWd2kyOi5F-jBdRoyW5lWNBVr1JqH9jnKf4KWSsf3sGpiOjcnnZEZ-YbHj0SvmwzM6nEhHajiCCJnRSqDqFbN7oT5ozZF6PKHhFqNhuQ8ULeVPALwKu8jeKA/3hr/yYFtEK7RTDWYwY_Gbgwcxw/h0/dvOKpxGDaZRqXfgHikCISZGkFPFUeUhO-qsKkhX0N4I)_
---
|
---
|
---
Hey Peter, today has been a day of sadness and mourning for many across Kentucky. Governor Beshear has estimated that we will likely see over 100 people dead as more bodies are pulled from the rubble of destroyed buildings and homes. Families have been devastated through loss of their homes, and many have lost a loved one who will never return to them. Please consider helping these families on one of two ways:
1. If you live in Louisville, or know people who do, **consider donating practical items.** I have partnered with one of Louisville's Mayoral Candidates, Timothy E Findley Jr., to collect donations that we will deliver to families in Mayfield, and beyond. Items can be brought to: 324 East Broadway, Louisville. If you don't live in Louisville, but know someone who does, please feel free to forward this information to them.
2. **Donate money.** Many organizations across Kentucky, including the Red Cross, are accepting financial donations to help with relief efforts in Kentucky.

---
As I have more information about how you can help people in Kentucky I keep you updated. Until then I encourage you to touch base with any family or friends you have in Kentucky and make sure they are safe. Donate items or money to trusted groups, and keep the people who have been affected in your thoughts and prayers.
---
Together for the people of Kentucky,
---
|
---
|
---
[ **LEARN MORE** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG081B0fzvpgn8DR-WeT1n7NHnhKlO0MTzmCjocaM4OWkvz93bSpaDmWoX8W7jjPQ9o0utMkzNmk3LVhHt5lZlbuZ8wGu6iG2QPg16DpWtQANBw-2IXhQ9EkSkdCTZnY-z5kfsbKhDmHGzLNtRLcyiveeZcZ1nq01r6VdpXLuEzRBbEYiQ2IIFHfwuUhoMjFx8F8kGPk7Pb_DWqkE-IBTZ2vTP4PG0OhwtmNiIs6_nY7-F/3hr/yYFtEK7RTDWYwY_Gbgwcxw/h1/brA-6FAfsumE9C5JJPkv5NINZpA3vav5JzGtJae2RVQ)

clean_body: Ways to help those in need because of recent storms | You're receiving this email because of your support for Democrats. But we don't want to send anyone an email who doesn't want to receive it. Please click here to | | Hey Peter, today has been a day of sadness and mourning for many across Kentucky. Governor Beshear has estimated that we will likely see over 100 people dead as more bodies are pulled from the rubble of destroyed buildings and homes. Families have been devastated through loss of their homes, and many have lost a loved one who will never return to them. Please consider helping these families on one of two ways: 1. If you live in Louisville, or know people who do, consider donating practical items. I have partnered with one of Louisville's Mayoral Candidates, Timothy E Findley Jr., to collect donations that we will deliver to families in Mayfield, and beyond. Items can be brought to: 324 East Broadway, Louisville. If you don't live in Louisville, but know someone who does, please feel free to forward this information to them. 2. Donate money. Many organizations across Kentucky, including the Red Cross, are accepting financial donations to help with relief efforts in Kentucky. As I have more information about how you can help people in Kentucky I keep you updated. Until then I encourage you to touch base with any family or friends you have in Kentucky and make sure they are safe. Donate items or money to trusted groups, and keep the people who have been affected in your thoughts and prayers. Together for the people of Kentucky, | | | | | | | ?linkid=8&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-thanksgiving-177&emailreferrer=email1382793&emailsubject=help-those-affected-by-storms Contact us at: mailto:info@ruthgao.com To donate by check, please mail to PO Box 20152, Louisville, KY 40250 (Please include your address, employer, and occupation for FEC filing purposes) Any donations to Ruth Gao for KY are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via .
